1000611029.english: What are you doing in a remote place like this?

1000611031.english: Oh, it's nothing. Well, I'll take my leave...
1000611031.korean: 아, 아무것도 아니에요. 그럼 전 이만...

1000611032.english: What are you hiding behind? Is that alcohol?
1000611032.korean: 뒤에 숨기신 거, 혹시 술 아닌가요?

1000611034.english: When I came to Orca, I was told by Constantia that alcohol was absolutely forbidden...
1000611034.korean: 제가 오르카에 올 때 콘스탄챠님에게 술은 절대 엄금이라고 들었었는데...

1000611035.english: Hmm... No matter how I look at it, it's alcohol, right? Right?

1000611036.english: Could you please pretend you didn't see it...?

1000611037.english: Huh? Are you asking me to lie?

1000611038.english: Oh, no. You can just not say anything...
1000611038.korean: 아, 아뇨. 그냥 아무 말도 안하시면 되는데...

1000611040.english: Hey, this is all I have right now, so should I give you this...?
1000611040.korean: 지, 지금 가진 건 이 술밖에 없는데, 이거라도 드릴까요...?

1000611041.english: Trying to silence alcohol with alcohol...

1000611042.english: ...Pfft, just kidding. I met a comrade and my playful side kicked in.
1000611042.korean: ...풋, 농담이에요. 동지를 만나서 장난기가 발동해 버렸네요.

1000611043.english: So, what does this look like?

1000611046.english: And it's a special moonshine that I made with 100 years of know-how.
1000611046.korean: 그것도 무려 제가 100년의 노하우를 담아 만든 특제 밀주죠.

1000611050.english: Hahaha, it's nice to be able to drink with other people for the first time in a while.
1000611050.korean: 우후후, 저도 오랜만에 다른 사람과 술을 마실 수 있어서 좋네요.

1000611051.english: When Constantia said alcohol was forbidden, I thought the sky was falling.
1000611051.korean: 콘스탄챠님이 술은 금지라고 하셨을 땐 하늘이 무너지는 줄 알았어요.

1000611052.english: But why was the ban imposed?

1000611054.english: You know our commander, right? He's usually so gentle...

1000611058.english: When I drink alcohol, it's just... oh my...

1000611062.english: Something rough or... violent... a little...

1000611063.english: Yes? No, no. That's not it at all!
1000611063.korean: 네? 아니, 아니에요. 그런 건 전혀 아니에요!

1000611064.english: I just heard it, but that's absolutely not the case.
1000611064.korean: 저도 그냥 듣기만 한 거지만, 그런 건 절대로 아니에요.

1000611066.english: Well, there's something like that. Why...

1000611067.english: Softly... tie your wrists slightly... cover your eyes or something like that...
1000611067.korean: 소프트하게... 손목을 살짝 묶거나... 눈을 가리거나 그런...

1000611068.english: Even if you're not particularly interested in that kind of thing... it's something that might make you fantasize or feel curious...
1000611068.korean: 그런 쪽에 크게 관심이 없어도... 그, 환상이나 호기심을 가져볼 법한 정도의...

1000611069.english: You don't hit or anything, do you?

1000611071.english: Well... to borrow Mr. War Wolf's words... 'It was good as usual, but when I drank and got a little stronger, my heart started pounding for some reason.'
1000611071.korean: 음... 워울프 씨 말을 빌리자면... '평소에도 좋았지만, 술을 마시고 조금 강하게 나오니까 왠지 두근거렸다.' 래요.

1000611072.english: I think I know that feeling...
1000611072.korean: 그 마음... 알 것 같기도 하구...

1000611074.english: If that's the case, then it's fine... No, rather, it's welcome...

1000611075.english: Hehehe, next time I'll definitely have to buy my guests some drinks.
1000611075.korean: 후훗, 다음에는 꼭 손님께 술을 먹여봐야겠어요.

1000611076.english: Yumi, do you like it when people come out that strong?
1000611076.korean: 유미 님도 그렇게 강하게 나오는 게 취향이신가요?

1000611078.english: I work in a remote area, so... I don't have any dating experience...
1000611078.korean: 저는 오지에서 근무하느라... 그, 그런 연애경험 같은 게 없어서...

1000611079.english: Just a normal day after work, having a drink together in my room... holding hands and watching a movie...
1000611079.korean: 그냥 평범하게 퇴근하고 방에서 같이 술 한잔 하면서... 소, 손 잡고 영화를 본다거나...

1000611081.english: Oh, there's nothing I can do...

1000611083.english: I haven't had many conversations with the Orca people, but they all talk about customers.
1000611083.korean: 오르카 분들과 많이 이야기를 나눠보진 못했지만, 하나같이 손님 얘기 뿐이에요.

1000611084.english: It can't be helped. This is the first time we've ever had a human treat us like that.
1000611084.korean: 그럴 수 밖에요. 저희에게 그렇게 대해주시는 인간님은 처음이니까요.

1000611085.english: Unlike those who have been reproduced and only have memories, those who survived, like me, are especially like that.
1000611085.korean: 기억으로만 갖고 있는 재생산 된 분들과는 달리, 저같이 살아남았던 개체들은 특히 그래요.

1000611086.english: Even though you're busy, you still care about and show interest in someone as small as me...
1000611086.korean: 바쁘신 와중에도 저같은 말단한테까지 신경 써주시고, 관심을 가져 주시고...

1000611087.english: It's stranger not to fall in love.

1000611088.english: What about Miss Circe? How was it meeting our Commander?
1000611088.korean: 키르케 씨는요? 저희 사령관님, 만나 보니까 어때요?

1000611090.english: Certainly, you are completely different from any other human being I have ever seen.
1000611090.korean: 확실히, 지금껏 제가 봐왔던 인간님들과는 전혀 다르시죠.

1000611091.english: I sent a letter with a half-hearted feeling after hearing that there was a human survivor...
1000611091.korean: 살아남은 인간님이 있다는 소식을 듣고 반쯤 자포자기한 심정으로 편지를 보냈었는데...

1000611092.english: I hope so... You did a great job. You made my wish come true.
1000611092.korean: 그러길... 정말로 잘 했어요. 제 소원을 이뤄주셨으니까요.

1000611093.english: And I also like the gentlemanly side of him not touching us carelessly.
1000611093.korean: 그리고 함부로 저희에게 손 대지 않는 신사적인 면도 좋아요.

1000611094.english: Actually, back then I was planning on seducing her physically and then asking her out...
1000611094.korean: 사실 그땐 몸으로 유혹한 다음 부탁할 생각이었는데...

1000611096.english: Oh, I guess I'm drunk too. I'm talking too much.

1000611097.english: The glass is empty. Here it is. Ah.

1000611099.english: It's a shame. It was fun after a long time...

1000611102.english: Haha, if you don't have it, I can just get it for you.

1000611103.english: Yes? There won't be a single drop of alcohol in Orca?
1000611103.korean: 네? 오르카엔 술이 한 방울도 없을텐데요?

1000611105.english: Uh, just the two of us? What about the Metal Parasites?

1000611106.english: Hahaha, I didn't flip over a tarot card and protect a theme park for 100 years.
1000611106.korean: 우후후, 제가 타로카드 뒤집어서 100년 동안 테마파크를 지킨 게 아니에요.

1000611108.english: Yumi, all you have to do is wave your antenna from behind and cheer us on. Okay, let's go!
1000611108.korean: 유미 님은 뒤에서 그 안테나 흔들면서 응원만 하시면 돼요. 자, 어서 가죠!

1000611110.english: - I returned to Orca with a heavy load but a light heart.
1000611110.korean: - 짐은 무거워졌지만 가벼운 마음으로 오르카에 귀환했다.

1000611111.english: Portia, let's go. Let's start by washing ourselves clean.
1000611111.korean: 포티아, 어서 가요. 우선 깨끗이 씻는 것부터 시작하죠.

1000611112.english: There's a lot to prepare for the night.
1000611112.korean: 밤을 위해서 준비해야할 게 아주 많아요.

1000611113.english: It's going to be a very harsh 'education'... so be prepared.

1000611115.english: Well, then, Master, Jo, a little... later... I, I'll see you...
1000611115.korean: 그, 그럼 주인님, 조, 조금... 이따가... 뵈, 뵙겠...

1000611116.english: Even if I take a picture...

1000611117.english: It's a shame. A woman with an open heart is truly a beautiful subject...
1000611117.korean: 아쉽네요. 마음을 활짝 연 여성은 정말 아름다운 피사체인데...

1000611118.english: Big Brother! You went and came back!

1000611119.english: Did you bring what I asked for?

1000611120.english: - As soon as I put down my heavy backpack, the doctor rushed in and checked its contents.
1000611120.korean: - 묵직한 배낭을 내려놓자 마자 닥터가 달려들어 내용물을 확인했다.

1000611121.english: Okay, this should be enough for now. We have stockpiles of supplies, too.
1000611121.korean: 좋았어, 일단 이정도면 충분해. 비축 물자도 있으니까.

1000611122.english: Now, I'll give you the next mission. Are you ready?
1000611122.korean: 이제 다음 임무를 줄게. 준비 됐어?

1000611124.english: - I have a bad feeling about this...

1000611125.english: Haha... Now that the party is ready, it's time for the gifts.
1000611125.korean: 후후... 파티 준비는 됐으니 이제 선물 차례야.

1000611126.english: When it comes to gifts, what matters is not the value of the gift itself, but how much it moves the recipient's heart, right?
1000611126.korean: 선물은 선물 자체의 가치보단 얼마나 받는 사람의 마음을 움직이는지가 중요해. 그렇지?

1000611127.english: - The doctor's eyes were now so bright that they seemed to be emitting rays of light.
1000611127.korean: - 닥터의 눈은 이제 빛나다 못해 광선을 뿜어낼 것 같았다.

1000611128.english: To do that, you need to know what the recipient wants.
1000611128.korean: 그러려면 받는 사람이 뭘 원하는지 알아야 돼.

1000611129.english: So, just for practice, if you were to receive a gift, what would you want?
1000611129.korean: 그럼 연습삼아서, 오빠가 선물을 받는다면 어떤 걸 받고 싶어?

1000611130.english: - I feel a strange sense of foreboding from this question. I'm sure I was asked the same question last time.
1000611130.korean: - 질문에서 묘한 기시감이 느껴진다. 분명 저번에 같은 질문을 받았었지.

1000611131.english: - At that time, I was so flustered that I made Sirene do something strange.
1000611131.korean: - 그때는 당황해서 세이렌이 엉뚱한 짓을 하게 해버렸었다.

1000611133.english: - The doctor, who had been pretending to cry in emotion, raised his head and smiled.
1000611133.korean: - 감동받아 우는 척 하던 닥터가 고개를 들며 씨익 웃었다.

1000611136.english: - A specific image formed in my head.

1000611137.english: - ...I can't tell the doctor something like this. I need to come up with a suitable answer quickly...
1000611137.korean: - ...이런 걸 닥터에게 말할 수는 없지. 빨리 적당한 대답을 생각해내야...

1000611138.english: - No, I wasn't the one receiving it in the first place.
1000611138.korean: - 아니, 애초에 내가 받는 게 아니잖아?

1000611140.english: Since it's a surprise party that my brother is preparing, I can't ask my sisters directly, right?
1000611140.korean: 오빠가 준비하는 건 깜짝 파티니까 언니들한테 직접 물어볼 수는 없잖아?

1000611141.english: So, there's something I prepared so that you can find out secretly.
1000611141.korean: 그러니까 오빠가 몰래 알아볼 수 있도록 준비해둔 게 있어.

1000611144.english: - Feather, who had disappeared at some point, appeared holding a box.
1000611144.korean: - 어느샌가 사라졌던 페더가 상자를 들고 나타났다.

1000611145.english: Woohoo, I made this in a hurry while my brother was out!
1000611145.korean: 우후후, 오빠가 나간 사이에 후다닥 만들어낸!

1000611147.english: - Just like you modified Silky's equipment earlier, did you modify Phantom's optical camouflage cloak this time?
1000611147.korean: - 아까 실키의 장비를 개조해줬던 것처럼 이번엔 팬텀의 광학미채망토를 개조해 준 건가?

1000611148.english: - I've always been curious about Phantom, so I'm looking forward to it.

1000611149.english: Okay, Feather will teach you how to use it. Should we use it together?
1000611149.korean: 자자, 사용법은 페더 언니가 알려줄거야. 둘이 사이좋게 써야해?

1000611151.english: - The doctor disappeared in a flash, leaving only Featherman behind.
1000611151.korean: - 쌩하니 사라져버린 닥터의 뒤로 나와 페더만 덩그러니 남겨졌다.

1000611153.english: - Listening to the members' stories... I feel a little uneasy about doing it secretly, but I think it's a good opportunity.
1000611153.korean: - 대원들의 이야기를 듣는다라... 몰래 한다는 건 조금 마음에 걸리지만 마침 좋은 기회라는 생각이 든다.

1000611154.english: - Because I couldn't pay much attention to you because I was busy with other things.
1000611154.korean: - 그동안 다른 일로 바쁘다는 핑계로 많이 신경을 못 써줬으니까.

1000611155.english: - Now, I can find out how the members usually spend their time.
1000611155.korean: - 이참에 대원들이 평소에 어떻게 지내는지도 알 수 있겠군.

1000611156.english: - I think I heard before that Phantom's cloak is powered by bioenergy...
1000611156.korean: - 전에 팬텀의 망토는 생체 에너지를 동력으로 작동한다는 말을 들은 것 같은데...

1000611157.english: - There's no way the doctor would give you something that doesn't work.
1000611157.korean: - 닥터가 못쓰는 걸 줬을 리는 없겠지.

1000611158.english: Hahaha, yes, that's right. You can just 'write it'.

1000611159.english: - I came to understand the meaning of Feather's meaningful smile only after a while.
1000611159.korean: - 의미심장한 페더의 미소의 의미를 난 얼마 후에 알게 되었다.

1000611163.english: No way. I would never tease the commander I adore. I would never do that, even if I died.
1000611163.korean: 설마요. 사모하는 사령관님을 놀리다니, 죽어도 그럴 일은 없어요.

1000611164.english: - Feather said it bluntly, but no matter how I look at it...
1000611164.korean: - 페더는 딱 잘라 말했지만 이건 아무리 봐도...

1000611165.english: - The box that I thought would contain the optical camouflage cloak was just a box.
1000611165.korean: - 안에 광학미채망토가 담겨있을 거라고 생각했던 상자는 그냥 상자였다.

1000611166.english: - I put my hand inside to stir it to see if it was already working, but I couldn't catch anything.
1000611166.korean: - 혹시 이미 작동중인가 싶어 안에 손을 넣어 휘저어봤지만 아무것도 잡히지 않았다.

1000611167.english: It's just a box. The doctor will be upset.

1000611168.english: This is the ultimate stealth device: a cardboard box.
1000611168.korean: 이것이야말로 궁극의 은신 장비인, 골판지 상자랍니다.

1000611169.english: Among them, there is a ‘Love Box' specially made for two people.

1000611170.english: - It's a name that really bothers me. And come to think of it, the design itself... with the heart marks all over it...
1000611170.korean: - 몹시 신경쓰이는 이름이다. 그리고보니 디자인부터가... 곳곳에 붙어 있는 하트 마크 하며...

1000611171.english: Well, I can't explain this... Why don't you just try it?
1000611171.korean: 음, 이걸 어떻게 설명드릴 수도 없고... 일단 써 보시는 게 어때요?

1000611172.english: I didn't believe it at first, but after experiencing the effects, things changed.
1000611172.korean: 저도 처음엔 안 믿겼는데, 효과를 체험하니까 달라지더라구요.

1000611174.english: - I crawled into the overturned box with a half-hearted feeling.
1000611174.korean: - 반쯤 자포자기한 심정으로 뒤집어진 상자 안으로 기어들어갔다.

1000611175.english: - As Feather followed in and placed the box on the floor, we were plunged into darkness, except for the light coming through the small hole for the handle.
1000611175.korean: - 페더가 뒤따라 들어와 상자를 바닥에 내려놓자 작게 뚫린 손잡이용 구멍으로 들어오는 빛을 빼곤 우리는 어둠에 휩싸였다.

1000611176.english: Now let's wait for someone to come.

1000611177.english: - A cardboard box sitting on the bridge would look suspicious to anyone.
1000611177.korean: - 함교에 덩그러니 놓여 있는 골판지 상자는 누가 봐도 수상해 보일 테지.

1000611178.english: - If it was a joke, I was thinking of putting a giant chestnut on the doctor's forehead, but Feather leaned in closer.
1000611178.korean: - 만약 장난이면 닥터의 이마에 대왕꿀밤을 놓아 주겠다는 생각을 하고 있는데, 페더가 살며시 몸을 기대왔다.

1000611179.english: Doesn't it make you feel at ease when you're in a dark, narrow space like this?
1000611179.korean: 이렇게 어둡고 좁은 공간에 있으면 마음이 편안해지지 않으세요?

1000611181.english: - As Feather said, I feel a sense of peace and strange stability.
1000611181.korean: - 페더의 말처럼 왠지 마음이 편안해지고 묘한 안정감이 든다.

1000611183.english: - Feather pressed his body against the narrow space.
1000611183.korean: - 좁은 공간에서 페더가 몸을 바짝 붙였다.

1000611184.english: Haha, it's too bad I can't take pictures because it's dark.
1000611184.korean: 후후, 어두워서 사진을 못찍는 게 아쉽네요.

1000611185.english: Well... at first I just took pictures for reconnaissance.
1000611185.korean: 음... 처음에는 그냥 정찰 겸 찍었어요.

1000611186.english: Then I started taking pictures of different things little by little, and surprisingly, I enjoyed it.
1000611186.korean: 그러다가 조금씩 다른 것들을 찍기 시작했는데, 의외로 즐겁더라구요.

1000611187.english: Wouldn't it be nice to capture precious things and happy moments in photos?
1000611187.korean: 소중한 것들이랑 행복한 순간들을 사진으로 남겨두면 좋잖아요?

1000611188.english: - Suddenly, I wonder what it would have been like if I had taken pictures of the things that happened.
1000611188.korean: - 문득 그동안 있었던 일들을 사진으로 찍어뒀으면 어땠을까 하는 생각이 든다.

1000611190.english: Let's do it a little better. Okay, back to it.
1000611190.korean: 좀 더 제대로 해봐요. 자, 다시.

1000611191.english: Huh, huh! I didn't make this specifically for you!
1000611191.korean: 흐, 흥! 딱히 널 위해 만든 건 아니라구!

1000611192.english: ...Undine, do you really think the Commander will like it if we do it this way?

1000611193.english: Of course! It says here, 'How to attract men unconditionally!'
1000611193.korean: 당연하죠! 여기 '무조건 남성을 사로잡는 방법!' 이라고 써있잖아요.

1000611194.english: - Looking through a small gap, we see Sirene and Undine talking over an old magazine.
1000611194.korean: - 작은 틈으로 내다보자 세이렌과 운디네가 낡은 잡지를 들고 이야기를 나누고 있다.

1000611195.english: But tsundere? What does that mean?
1000611195.korean: 그런데 츤... 데레? 이건 무슨 뜻이죠?

1000611196.english: It's like a nickname given to an attractive woman.

1000611197.english: If you look here, it says, 'Very popular with men!'
1000611197.korean: 여기 보면, '남자들에게 인기 만점!' 이라고 되어있죠?

1000611198.english: I see... I should try to become a tsundere too.

1000611199.english: Good. Then read the next one.

1000611200.english: Hmm... Hey, spring potatoes are delicious.

1000611203.english: Potato... It's the potato we know, right?
1000611203.korean: 감자라면... 저희가 아는 그 감자가 맞겠죠?

1000611204.english: Why are there potatoes all of a sudden...

1000611206.english: You're saying potatoes are delicious? Well, that's...

1000611208.english: Oh, right! That's what I mean. Yes...

1000611210.english: I'd like to practice more. Can I borrow this book?
1000611210.korean: 더 연습해보고 싶어요. 이 책, 빌려주실 수 있나요?

1000611211.english: Oh, of course. I've seen it all!

1000611212.english: Haha, thank you. If there's anything I don't know, I'll go ask.
1000611212.korean: 후후, 고마워요. 모르는 게 있으면 물어보러 갈게요.

1000611213.english: Well, I have a commander-level meeting, so I'll go first... See you later.
1000611213.korean: 그럼 저는 지휘관급 회의가 있어서 먼저... 이따가 봐요.

1000611215.english: - Where on earth did you get a magazine like that...?

1000611216.english: - I need to prepare an appropriate reaction for the Sirene that will come soon.
1000611216.korean: - 조만간 찾아올 세이렌을 위해 적절한 리액션을 준비해둬야겠군.

1000611217.english: Ah, I pretended to know for nothing...

1000611218.english: Oh no... What should I do...

1000611220.english: As expected, the Horizon members are cute.

1000611221.english: Since you're mostly outside of Orca, take pictures... Huh?!
1000611221.korean: 주로 오르카 밖에 계셔서 사진... 읍?!

1000611223.english: How long has it been since I came back and I have to go out again?
1000611223.korean: 복귀한 지 얼마나 됐다고 또 나가야 돼?

1000611224.english: You've been given a mission. Don't complain.

1000611225.english: The Commander would rather have a drink and hang out together than do something like that...
1000611225.korean: 사령관은 그런 것보단 술 한잔 딱 하면서 같이 뒹구는 걸 좋아할텐데...

1000611226.english: A ban on alcohol was even imposed because of you, and you're saying something like that?
1000611226.korean: 너 때문에 금주령까지 내려졌는데 그런 소리가 나와?

1000611228.english: He said he'd go out early. Let's go too.
1000611228.korean: 미리 나가 계신댔어. 우리도 어서 가자.

1000611229.english: - War Wolf and Quick Camel disappeared towards the exit.
1000611229.korean: - 워울프와 퀵 카멜이 출구 쪽으로 사라졌다.

1000611230.english: - The Horde probably hasn't had any work to do since the reconnaissance mission earlier...
1000611230.korean: - 호드는 아까 정찰 임무 이후로 맡은 일이 없을 텐데...

1000611231.english: - I tilted my head in confusion, and something started to stir inside my arms.
1000611231.korean: - 의아함에 고개를 꺾고 있는데, 품 속에서 무언가가 버둥거리기 시작했다.

1000611233.english: Commander, you too. You shouldn't do that in a place like this.
1000611233.korean: 사령관님도 참. 이런데서 그러시면 안 돼요.

1000611234.english: I can't help it, you're playing so rough before we even held hands...
1000611234.korean: 아직 손도 안 잡았는데 그런 거친 플레이라니, 어쩔 수 없네요...

1000611235.english: - Talon Feather, who had been laughing, sat up and opened the box.
1000611235.korean: - 우후후 웃던 탈론 페더가 몸을 일으키며 상자를 열었다.

1000611236.english: - I also got up and stretched my stiff legs, looking towards the exit where War Wolf and Camel had disappeared.
1000611236.korean: - 나도 뒤따라 일어나 굳은 다리를 풀며 워울프와 카멜이 사라진 출구쪽으로 시선을 향했다.

1000611238.english: - So where are you going now? Besides, Sirene has a commander-level meeting...
1000611238.korean: - 그럼 지금은 어딜 가는 거지? 게다가 세이렌이 지휘관급 회의가 있다고...

1000611239.english: Oh, no. It's late, so I guess you should just rest today...
1000611239.korean: 아, 아뇨. 아무래도 시간도 늦었고 그러니까 오늘은 그냥 쉬시는게...

1000611240.english: - When I shook my head, Feather's face became sad.
1000611240.korean: - 내가 고개를 젓자 페더의 얼굴이 울상이 되었다.

1000611241.english: - Just like Horizon a little while ago, the Horde is small in number and is mainly responsible for reconnaissance and mobile strike missions, so there is not much opportunity to see them in Orca.
1000611241.korean: - 조금 전의 호라이즌도 그렇지만, &n호드는 인원도 적은데다 주로 정찰과 기동타격 임무를 맡아서 오르카에서 얼굴을 볼 일이 잘 없다.

1000611242.english: - I always felt bad that I couldn't take care of you, so this is a good thing.
1000611242.korean: - 챙겨주지 못한 게 늘 마음에 걸렸었는데, 마침 잘 됐군.

1000611243.english: Well, I'll tell you about that. So...

1000611244.english: - I stopped walking as I headed towards the exit.

1000611245.english: - Holding the box in my hand makes me feel at ease...

1000611248.english: - It was good that they were secretly chasing them, but the Horde's movement speed was beyond imagination.
1000611248.korean: - 몰래 뒤쫓아 나온 것까진 좋았지만, 호드의 이동속도는 상상을 초월했다.

1000611249.english: - After a few minutes of frantic chasing, the Horde's figure finally disappeared into the darkness of the night.
1000611249.korean: - 허겁지겁 뒤쫓아가길 몇 분, 호드의 모습은 결국 밤의 어둠 속으로 사라져 버렸다.

1000611251.english: - Second, we were so focused on chasing the Horde that we didn't think about the threats that were always right around us.
1000611251.korean: - 두 번째는, 호드를 뒤쫓는 데에만 정신이 팔려 항상 우리 근처에 있는 위협에 대해 생각하지 못한 것.

1000611252.english: - As we were walking back to Orca, Feather lowered his voice and warned us of the danger.
1000611252.korean: - 터덜터덜 오르카로 돌아가던 중, 페더가 목소리를 낮추며 위험을 알려왔다.

1000611253.english: - They say there aren't many Metal Parasites around here, but here, there are only two non-combatants, Feather and I.
1000611253.korean: - 이 근처엔 철충이 적다지만 이쪽은 비전투 인원인 페더와 나 둘 뿐.

1000611254.english: - While he was debating whether to take out the personal firearm he was carrying, one of the Metal Parasite fell to a flying sniper.
1000611254.korean: - 지니고 다니던 개인 화기를 꺼내야하나 고민하던 중 날아든 저격에 철충 하나가 쓰러졌다.

1000611255.english: - While Feather was distracting the worms, the sniper dealt with them one by one.
1000611255.korean: - 페더가 철충을 교란하는 사이 저격수는 철충을 차례차례 처리했다.

1000611256.english: - And now, the sniper appeared before my eyes.
1000611256.korean: - 그리고 지금, 그 저격수가 눈 앞에 나타났다.

1000611257.english: Were you keeping your head down?

1000611258.english: Sigh, even in a safe area, it's like that. What if the two of us go out together?
1000611258.korean: 하아, 아무리 안전지역이라도 그렇지. 둘이서만 나오면 어떡해?

1000611259.english: - Even if I had ten mouths, I wouldn't have anything to say.
1000611259.korean: - 입이 열 개라도 할 말이 있을리 없다.

1000611260.english: - As I remained silent with a sense of reflection, Miho smiled brightly.
1000611260.korean: - 내가 반성의 뜻을 담아 침묵을 지키고 있자 미호가 방긋 웃었다.

1000611261.english: It's okay. As long as you're not hurt, that's fine.

1000611262.english: Thanks for your support, Feather. It made things easier.

1000611264.english: Commander, I think it's best to return to Orca now.
1000611264.korean: 사령관님, 이제 오르카로 돌아가시는 게 좋겠어요.

1000611265.english: It's late, and there's been a skirmish, so other people are probably worried.
1000611265.korean: 시간도 늦었고, 교전이 있었으니 다른 분들이 많이 걱정하실 거예요.

1000611267.english: - Miho cut me off, fiddling with the hem of her clothes and tapping the floor with her toes.
1000611267.korean: - 내 말을 끊은 미호가 옷자락을 만지작거리며 발 끝으로 바닥을 툭툭 쳤다.

1000611270.english: Why don't you take a quick look around? So... ah, reconnaissance. Just for reconnaissance...
1000611270.korean: 주변을 잠깐, 돌아보지 않을래? 그러니까... 아, 정찰. 정찰 겸 해서...

1000611272.english: Ahaha, it's too late. Okay, let's go.
1000611272.korean: 아하하, 너무 늦긴 했지. 자, 어서 가자.

1000611273.english: - Miho's shoulders, who is leading the way, seem to be slumped for some reason.
1000611273.korean: - 앞장 서는 미호의 어깨가 왠지 축 쳐져 있다.

1000611274.english: - I returned to Orca, trying to shake off the uneasy feeling.
1000611274.korean: - 찝찝한 기분을 애써 지우며 오르카로 돌아왔다.

1000611276.english: - Miho's face, which had been trembling, suddenly brightened.

1000611277.english: Hmm... Hehe, that would be fine too.

1000611278.english: Commander, then I will return first.

1000611279.korean: - 페더는 말을 걸 새도 없이 사라져버렸다.

1000611280.english: - Miho, who had been quietly looking up at the sky until the engine noise disappeared, opened her mouth.
1000611280.korean: - 엔진 소리가 들리지 않을 때까지 조용히 하늘을 올려다보고 있던 미호가 입을 열었다.

1000611282.english: - Miho and I walked together without saying a word, looking at each other.
1000611282.korean: - 미호와 단 둘이서 말없이 눈길을 걸었다.

1000611283.english: - In the quiet forest, only the sound of two footsteps crunching on the snow resonates.
1000611283.korean: - 고요한 숲속에 눈을 밟는 두 개의 발소리만이 울린다.

1000611284.english: - Miho, who was walking a step ahead with her backpack on, suddenly stopped walking.
1000611284.korean: - 뒷짐을 지고 한 발자국 정도 앞서 걷던 미호가 문득 걸음을 멈췄다.

1000611285.english: Cook, it's funny when you think about it.

1000611286.english: - Miho turned around and looked at me.
1000611286.korean: - 미호가 빙글 몸을 돌려 나를 보았다.

1000611287.english: What I said earlier. This entire area has been scouted, and all the Metal Parasites have been dealt with, yet you're saying it's scouted?
1000611287.korean: 아까 내가 한 말. 이 근방은 전부 정찰된 곳이고 철충도 전부 처리했는데 정찰이라니.

1000611288.english: - Miho, who was chuckling happily, came over and grabbed my hand.
1000611288.korean: - 기분좋게 쿡쿡 웃던 미호가 다가와 내 손을 잡았다.

1000611289.english: If I wanted to be alone with the popular commander, I had to do something obvious like this.
1000611289.korean: 인기 만점인 사령관하고 단 둘이 있으려면 이런 뻔히 보이는 짓이라도 해야지 어쩌겠어.

1000611290.english: - There was another moment of comfortable silence.

1000611291.english: - Miho, who had been fidgeting with her entangled fingers, spoke quietly.
1000611291.korean: - 얽힌 손가락을 꼼지락거리던 미호가 조용히 말을 꺼냈다.

1000611293.english: Lies. It's written all over your face.

1000611296.english: Just leave things like commanding small battles to the commanders.
1000611296.korean: 자잘한 전투 지휘 같은 건 그냥 지휘관들한테 맡기구, 좀.

1000611297.english: I know you're doing this out of fear of us getting hurt, but I don't want you to have a hard time because of it.
1000611297.korean: 우리들 다칠까봐 그러는 건 알지만, 그것때문에 사령관이 힘들어지는건 싫어.

1000611298.english: - Miho's sincerity was conveyed through her light tone.

1000611300.english: I'll have to punish the liar. Close your eyes.

1000611301.english: I closed my eyes obediently as I was told. I could tell Miho was standing before me by the crunch of her feet on the snow.
1000611301.korean: - 시키는 대로 얌전히 눈을 감았다. 뽀드득 눈을 밟는 소리로 미호가 내 앞에 서는 것을 알 수 있었다.

1000611302.english: - I heard Miho take a small breath. And then,
1000611302.korean: - 미호가 작게 숨을 들이마시는 소리가 들렸다. 그리고,

1000611304.english: - I opened my eyes in surprise and saw pink braided hair fluttering in front of my eyes.
1000611304.korean: - 놀라서 눈을 뜨자 땋아내린 분홍빛 머리가 눈 앞에서 찰랑였다.

1000611307.english: - Miho took the hand that was extended again.

1000611308.english: - The journey back to Orca felt so short.
1000611308.korean: - 오르카로 돌아가는 눈길이 너무나 짧게 느껴졌다.

1000611310.english: It's not a stone, it's a stone head, you idiot.

1000611311.english: What are you doing with a gun?

1000611312.english: Let's see... Are you trying to hit that tree? Wake up. You're way out of range.
1000611312.korean: 보자... 저 나무를 맞히려고? 꿈 깨셔. 유효사거리 한참 벗어났어.

1000611314.english: If you put your eyes in your mouth like this... Ugh, hag.
1000611314.korean: 이렇게 눈을 입에 넣으면... 윽, 하가어.

1000611315.english: If this is the case, I can do it alone...
1000611315.korean: 이허면 옴히 해 힙기믈 홀 수...

1000611317.english: What, what. Did you really get it right?!

1000611319.english: It missed the target by about 2.4cm.

1000611320.english: I'm a lone sniper now, but a pistol has its limits.
1000611320.korean: 지금 난 고독한 저격수지만, 권총으로는 역시 한계가 있군.

1000611321.english: Seriously, what movie did you watch again?
1000611321.korean: 진짜 너는... 또 무슨 영화를 본 거야?

1000611322.english: I've seen a few movies that fit the theme of snow operations.
1000611322.korean: 설원 작전에 어울리는 영화를 몇 편 봤지.

1000611323.english: But there wasn't a single person using dual pistols.
1000611323.korean: 그런데 쌍권총을 쓰는 사람은 한 명도 없더라구.

1000611324.english: Why doesn't anyone appreciate the coolness of dual-wielding pistols?
1000611324.korean: 왜 아무도 쌍권총의 멋짐을 알아주지 않는거지?

1000611325.english: Well, that's because everyone is smarter than you!

1000611326.english: Where's the guy trying to snipe with dual pistols?

1000611327.english: Sigh, our models of the past must have been completely devastated after seeing your seniors throw away their rifles.
1000611327.korean: 하아, 과거의 우리 모델들은 네 선배들이 소총 가져다 버리는 걸 보고 홧병으로 전멸했을 게 분명해.

1000611329.english: The snipers were all carrying rifles. Very large ones, I'm talking about.
1000611329.korean: 저격수들은 하나같이 소총을 들고 있었지. 아주 커다란 걸로 말이야.

1000611330.english: Camel, do you have a rifle?

1000611331.english: You're here? It's been so long since we fought together that you might have forgotten, but I'm a fire support unit.
1000611331.korean: 있겠어? 우리가 같이 싸운지 너무 오래되서 까먹으셨나 본데, 난 화력 지원 유닛이라구.

1000611332.english: This is difficult... I need a rifle, a rifle.

1000611336.english: It's been a long time since I've seen the captain look so dumbfounded.
1000611336.korean: 대장이 어이없어하는 거 진짜 오랜만에 본다.

1000611337.english: Sorry, boss. I guess this idiot got a weird feeling watching another movie.
1000611337.korean: 죄송해요, 대장. 이 멍청이가 또 영화보고 이상한 바람이 들었나 봐요.

1000611338.english: With just a rifle, you can become a perfect sniper.
1000611338.korean: 소총만 있으면 완벽한 저격수로 거듭날 수 있을 거야.

1000611339.english: ...Would you like to try using this revolver cannon?

1000611342.korean: 풋, 팔 덜덜 떨리는 것 봐.

1000611343.english: Hey, you won't even be able to hit that mountain over there.
1000611343.korean: 야, 그래가지고는 저기 저 산도 못맞추겠다.

1000611344.english: Ugh, I can't get the posture right...!

1000611345.english: That's why you're so obsessed with it! Give it back to the captain quickly.
1000611345.korean: 그걸 그렇게 견착하려고 하니까 그렇지! 빨리 대장한테 돌려드려.

1000611347.english: No, Captain. Let's take our time.

1000611348.english: Hmm, if you really need to, I guess it would be best to ask Valkyrie.
1000611348.korean: 흠, 정 필요하다면 발키리에게 물어보는 게 좋을 것 같다.

1000611349.english: Oh, right! I was just thinking about that.
1000611349.korean: 오, 그래! 나도 마침 그 생각하는 중이었어.

1000611350.english: Then I'll be back. See you later.

1000611351.english: Hey? Hey! Where are you going on a mission!

1000611353.english: Captain, give me permission to fire.

1000611354.english: I think I need to get that right to come to my senses.
1000611354.korean: 저건 좀 맞아야 정신을 차릴 것 같아요.

1000611356.english: Huh? That's just so unnecessarily fast, it'll be... Huh? It'll be back again?
1000611356.korean: 네? 저거 쓸데없이 빠르기만 해서 곧... 어? 다시 돌아오네?

1000611357.english: Captain! The Metal Parasites are approaching!

1000611358.english: Now we can prepare to fire.

1000611359.english: Unfortunately, we'll have to postpone shooting the werewolf until next time.
1000611359.korean: 아쉽지만 워울프를 쏘는 건 다음으로 미루도록 하지.

1000611360.english: Sigh... Hey. I thought you almost died today.
1000611360.korean: 하아... 야. 너 오늘 죽다 살아난 줄 알아.

1000611361.english: Let's see. Ah, I can see it with my naked eye.

1000611362.english: I don't think it's necessary to go all the way to the captain. War Wolf, let's go.
1000611362.korean: 대장까지 나설 필요도 없을 것 같아요. 워울프, 가자.

1000611366.english: Captain, are you sure it's okay to send him alone?
1000611366.korean: 대장, 진짜 쟤 혼자 보내도 괜찮겠어요?

1000611367.english: I emptied his pockets to make sure he had no alcohol, but he's still a drunk who causes trouble even when he's sober.
1000611367.korean: 일단 주머니 털어서 술 없는 건 확인했는데, 쟤는 맨정신으로도 깽판 치는 애잖아요.

1000611368.english: I'd rather call Feather... No, no. That's absolutely not allowed...
1000611368.korean: 차라리 페더 불러다가... 아니, 아니지. 그것만은 절대로 안 돼...

1000611369.english: Feather is on another mission right now, so that won't work.
1000611369.korean: 페더는 지금 다른 임무중이니 그건 안되겠군.

1000611370.english: And even if Feather had been there, he would have sent War Wolf alone.
1000611370.korean: 그리고 페더가 있었어도 워울프 혼자 보냈을거다.

1000611372.english: I can't say it with my own mouth.
1000611372.korean: 내 입으로 직접 말할 수는 없다.

1000611374.english: Hehe, that sounds fun, doesn't it?

1000611375.english: I should have sent him off after giving him a lot of alcohol.
1000611375.korean: 술이라도 잔뜩 먹여서 보낼 걸 그랬네요.

1000611376.english: I'm looking forward to seeing what happens.

1000611377.english: In times like these, even that fool is helpful.

1000611382.english: Before I knew it, I was being treated as a set with War Wolf... Should I just die?
1000611382.korean: 어느새 저까지 워울프랑 한 세트로 취급당하더라구요... 그냥 죽을까...

1000611385.english: Sigh, I need to come to my senses too... Cheer up...
1000611385.korean: 하아, 나라도 정신 차리고 있어야해... 힘내자...

1000611388.english: It's not easy to move around because of the snow.

1000611389.english: I don't know if it's even half the usual speed...

1000611390.english: Let's take a break and change our policy.

1000611392.english: Hehe, I guess you need some eyes?

1000611395.english: I briefly handed it over to Miho.

1000611396.english: Wow, the atmosphere was great. Oh, and I didn't forget to take a picture. I hope you don't get caught.
1000611396.korean: 우후후, 분위기 좋더라구요. 아, 사진도 잊지 않고 찍어놨답니다. 안 들키게요.

1000611401.english: Sir, I'm sorry, but I need to talk to Camel for a moment...
1000611401.korean: 대, 대장님. 죄송한데 저 잠깐 카멜이랑 얘기를 좀...

1000611402.english: Hmm, I understand. Call me when you're done.

1000611403.english: Ka, Camel...? I have a quick question, is that okay...?
1000611403.korean: 카, 카멜...? 잠깐 물어보고 싶은 게 있는데, 괜찮을까요...?

1000611404.english: I think I know what it is, but just tell me.
1000611404.korean: 뭔지 알 것 같지만 일단 말해 봐.

1000611405.english: Oh, by any chance... did you know all this?

1000611406.english: Hey! So you thought I didn't notice you tossing and turning under the covers every night?!
1000611406.korean: 야! 그럼 밤마다 이불 속에서 꼼지락거리는데 모를 줄 알았어?!

1000611407.english: At least turn down the volume! The Commander's voice is leaking out!
1000611407.korean: 볼륨이라도 좀 줄이던가! 사령관님 목소리 다 새어나오더만!

1000611408.english: Now, speak softly...! The captain will hear you...!

1000611409.english: Don't you know that I secretly change the sheets and put my underwear in the laundry basket every morning...!
1000611409.korean: 새벽마다 몰래 시트갈고 속옷 세탁 바구니에 넣는 걸 모르겠냐고...!

1000611410.english: Sigh, this guy and that guy, they're all just... idiots...
1000611410.korean: 하아, 이 놈이고 저 놈이고 진짜... 바보들 뿐이야...

1000611411.english: Can I ask you a favor...?

1000611413.english: Please keep it a secret from Captain Khan...

1000611414.english: Rather than being caught by the captain... I'd rather just go back to being a genetic seed...
1000611414.korean: 대장님께 들키느니... 그냥 유전자 씨앗으로 돌아갈래요...

1000611417.english: Even the most cherished general would faint if he found out that his most cherished staff member was a delusional pervert.
1000611417.korean: 아무리 대장이라도 아끼는 참모가 망상변태였다는 걸 알면 졸도하실거야.

1000611418.english: Thank you... Camel is my lifesaver...

1000611419.english: As a thank you, here's a picture of you, Commander, that I took last time. Would you like to see it?
1000611419.korean: 보답으로 여기... 저번에 찍은 사령관님 사진인데, 보실래요?

1000611420.english: I'm not interested in that kind of thing... Uh...
1000611420.korean: 난 그런 거엔 관심 없... 엇...

1000611422.english: Right? There are many others. Well...

1000611423.english: Joe, please turn the page a little slower.

1000611425.english: Hahaha, sharing hobbies is such a fun thing.
1000611425.korean: 우후후, 취미를 공유한다는 건 굉장히 즐거운 일이네요.

1000611428.english: Pe, Peder. I'll do that later...

1000611432.english: Then I'll go back to Orca.

1000611434.english: Those damn guys... why were they moving this part?
1000611434.korean: 철충 녀석들... 이 부품은 왜 옮기고 있었던 걸까요?

1000611435.english: Just like the resource mining site last time, &n I don't know if they're going to really settle down here now.
1000611435.korean: 저번의 자원 채굴장도 그렇고, &n이제 이곳에 본격적으로 자리를 잡으려는 건지도 모르지.

1000611436.english: It's terrible... There are already so many, but if we were to produce other weapons or something...
1000611436.korean: 끔찍하네요... 지금도 어마어마하게 많은데, 다른 병기를 생산하거나 한다면...

1000611438.english: As long as we have a commander, we cannot be defeated.
1000611438.korean: 사령관이 있는 한, 우리에게 패배란 없다.

1000611439.english: Haven't you seen it so far?

1000611441.english: Please pay attention to each and every one of us there...

1000611442.english: I was really surprised when I heard it this time too.

1000611445.english: At least as far as I know, it's unprecedented.
1000611445.korean: 적어도 내가 아는 한 유래가 없는 일이지.

1000611446.english: There really is a reason why everyone falls in love.

1000611447.english: When the other captains look at the commander...
1000611447.korean: 다른 대장님들도 사령관님 보는 눈빛을 보면...

1000611448.english: Oh, Captain Khan, how about you decorate yourself a bit now?
1000611448.korean: 아, 칸 대장님도 이제 좀 꾸며보시는 게 어때요?

1000611451.english: Look, Captain Marie. The men prepared some nice clothes for you and put you in your room.
1000611451.korean: 마리 대장님 봐요. 부대원들이 예쁜 옷 마련해주고 사령관님 방에 밀어 넣었잖아요.

1000611452.english: Please give us a chance to prove our loyalty!

1000611453.english: I already know your heart well...
1000611453.korean: 너희의 마음은 이미 잘 알고 있...

1000611454.english: Since the basics are good, the captain will look good no matter how he dresses up.
1000611454.korean: 대장님은 기본이 좋으시니까 어떻게 꾸며도 잘 어울리실거예요.

1000611455.english: Well, at first, don't be too harsh...
1000611455.korean: 음, 그래도 처음엔 너무 과하지 않게...

1000611456.english: Would it be better to go subtle and bring out the innocent mask?
1000611456.korean: 청순한 마스크를 살리는 쪽으로 은은하게 가는게 좋으려나?

1000611458.english: Got the parts. Send me the coordinates.

1000611460.english: Hi, sisters! Can you hear me?

1000611461.english: The doctor will explain the plans for the future!

1000611462.english: You know the gist, right? I'm going to throw you a grand party! And secretly!
1000611462.korean: 대충은 알고 있지? 오빠를 위해 성대한 파티를 열 거야! 그것도 몰래!

1000611463.english: Okay, then let's go get ready!

1000611465.english: Could you elaborate a little more?

1000611467.english: You can get the supplies you need for the party there.
1000611467.korean: 거기서 파티에 필요한 물자를 손에 넣을 수 있을 거야.

1000611468.english: I saw the AGS still operating inside. We'll take care of cleaning up there and the city center.
1000611468.korean: 내부에서 아직 가동중인 AGS들을 봤어. 그곳과 도심을 청소하는 건 우리가 맡을게.

1000611469.english: Because street fighting is Valhalla's specialty.

1000611470.english: Then the Horde patrols the outskirts of the city.

1000611471.english: If the commander hears a report about the shopping mall, he'll definitely head there...
1000611471.korean: 사령관이 쇼핑몰에 대한 보고를 들으면 분명 그곳으로 향할테니...

1000611472.english: We will eliminate the danger factor by eliminating the Metal Parasites on the outskirts of the city.
1000611472.korean: 도시 외곽의 철충들을 소탕해서 위험요소를 배제하겠다.

1000611473.english: Hehe, as expected from the Commander Sisters. I like how the story moves quickly.
1000611473.korean: 히힛, 역시 지휘관 언니들이야. 이야기가 빨라서 좋네.

1000611476.english: I'm not sure. I think it'll be okay...
1000611476.korean: 잘 모르겠어. 아마 괜찮을 것 같긴한데...

1000611477.english: Oh, Leona. I want to ask Gremlin for help. Is that okay?
1000611477.korean: 아, 레오나 언니. 그렘린 언니한테 도와달라고 하고 싶은데 괜찮아?

1000611479.english: And since the power generation facility is safe, we can save electricity and build a drying facility near the shopping mall...
1000611479.korean: 거기다가 발전시설도 무사하니까 전력 살리고, 건조장을 쇼핑몰 근처에 세우면...

1000611480.english: Yeah, I think it will work. If you don't have enough time, you can make it a little smaller.
1000611480.korean: 응, 될 것 같아. 정 시간이 모자라면 조금 작게 만들지 뭐.

1000611482.english: Before we begin, have you noticed anything strange with the Commander?
1000611482.korean: 시작하기전에 잠깐, 혹시 사령관의 상태가 이상한 걸 눈치 챘나?

1000611483.english: Even at first glance, you looked very tired.

1000611485.english: So, to celebrate becoming an adult, I wanted to do this and that with my brother, but I gave up.
1000611485.korean: 그래서 어른이 된 기념으로 오빠랑 이것저것 하고 싶었는데 그만뒀어.

1000611486.english: Huh. That makes sense. How can you possibly have any energy left when you're working day and night like that?
1000611486.korean: 흥. 그럴만도 하지. 그렇게 밤이고 낮이고 일 붙잡고 있는데 몸이 남아나겠어?

1000611487.english: Now I'm a cool guy, so I don't have to try so hard...
1000611487.korean: 이제 그렇게 애쓰지 않아도 충분히 멋진 남자가 됐는데...

1000611488.english: It's good to help prepare the gift, but please pay attention to the commander's physical condition.
1000611488.korean: 선물 준비를 돕는 것도 좋지만, 사령관의 몸 상태에 유의해줬으면 한다.

1000611489.english: Okay, I got it. I'll keep checking.

1000611490.english: Ugh... If only the research had progressed a little further...

1000611491.english: Hurry up a little more. It's a party, but the Commander's health is the most important.
1000611491.korean: 조금만 더 서둘러 봐. 파티도 파티인데, 사령관의 몸이 가장 중요하니까.

1000611492.english: Besides... for the sake of the sisters who want to bear fruit in love with the Commander after this war ends.
1000611492.korean: 거기다... 이 전쟁이 끝나면 사령관과 사랑의 결실을 맺고 싶어하는 자매들을 위해서도 말야.

1000611493.english: I hope it turns out well.

1000611494.english: Then the Horde will begin operations immediately from their current location. That's all.
1000611494.korean: 그럼 호드는 현위치에서 바로 작전을 시작하지. 이상.

1000611495.english: - I heard a report that was delayed because I was running around looking for a gift.
1000611495.korean: - 선물을 구하러 돌아다니느라 밀렸던 보고를 들었다.

1000611496.english: - One of them really caught my attention.

1000611498.english: Yeah, yeah. Oh, Leona said, "Thanks, that's enough."
1000611498.korean: 응응. 아, 레오나 언니가 '감사는 됐어.' 라고 했어.

1000611499.english: - Even without looking, Leona's words come to mind clearly.
1000611499.korean: - 보지 않아도 레오나가 말하는 모습이 머릿속에 선명히 떠오른다.

1000611500.english: If you just renovate the exterior of a shopping mall, it's almost like new.
1000611500.korean: 쇼핑몰은 겉만 수리하면 거의 새 거나 다름없어요.

1000611501.english: However, I think it needs to be sorted out because the AGS is still in operation.
1000611501.korean: 다만 그 이유가 아직 기동하고 있는 AGS들 때문이라, 정리가 필요할 것 같아요.

1000611502.english: Hehe, yeah. 'Be thankful for this,' he said.

1000611503.english: He said he would leave early and clean up around the shopping mall.
1000611503.korean: 미리 출발해서 쇼핑몰 주변을 정리하고 있겠다고 했어.

1000611504.english: - But if Leona and Valhalla went...

1000611505.english: No. Sister Leona just knows it's a material search mission.
1000611505.korean: 아니. 레오나 언니는 그냥 물자탐색 임무로 알고 있어.

1000611507.english: - Come to think of it, I overlooked that. I'll have to sweat a little to appease him later...
1000611507.korean: - 생각해보니 그걸 간과했군. 나중에 달래주려면 진땀 좀 빼겠는데...

1000611508.english: Yes, master. Don't worry about Orca. I'll take care of the work.
1000611508.korean: 네, 주인님. 오르카는 걱정 마세요. 업무도 제가 맡을게요.

1000611509.english: And don't push yourself too hard.

1000611511.english: Ugh... Lying to my brother is so hard...
1000611511.korean: 으으... 오빠한테 거짓말 하는 건 이렇게나 힘든 거구나...

1000611513.english: Me too... I'm worried about how the owner will react.
1000611513.korean: 저도요... 주인님이 어떤 반응을 보이실지 걱정되기도 하고요.

1000611514.english: Yeah... At first I thought my brother would just be happy...
1000611514.korean: 응... 처음엔 오빠가 그냥 기뻐할 거라고만 생각했는데...

1000611515.english: You're not going to be mad at me for lying to you, are you?

1000611516.english: Haha, I don't think that's true.

1000611517.english: Doctor, you might be able to feed your hair a little honey.
1000611517.korean: 닥터 머리에 꿀밤 정도는 먹이실지도 모르겠네요.

1000611519.english: Then I'll go too. See you later!

1000611521.english: [c][57e137]A little later, in the captain's quarters[-][/c]

1000611522.english: - As soon as I returned to the captain's room and closed the door, I sighed without realizing it.
1000611522.korean: - 함장실로 돌아와 문을 닫자마자 나도 모르게 한숨이 나왔다.

1000611523.english: - I put the backpack on my shoulder. It felt a little heavier than when I first put it on.
1000611523.korean: - 한쪽에 내려둔 배낭을 맸다. 처음 맸을 때보다 조금 더 무겁게 느껴진다.

1000611524.english: - You must be tired... But you can't quit in the middle.
1000611524.korean: - 피로가 쌓이긴 했나... 그래도 도중에 그만둘 순 없지.

1000611525.english: - Let's finish and rest, let's finish.

1000611527.english: Um... This should be enough for now. I'll prepare the rest.
1000611527.korean: 음... 일단 이정도면 되겠다. 나머지는 내가 준비해볼게.

1000611528.english: - The tablet the doctor handed me was densely written with letters.
1000611528.korean: - 닥터가 건넨 태블릿에는 글자가 빽빽하게 적혀 있다.

1000611530.english: But if the other sisters knew that Big Brother worked hard to prepare it, they would be really touched, right?
1000611530.korean: 그래도 오빠가 고생해서 준비했다는 거 알면 다른 언니들, 엄청 감동할 걸?

1000611531.english: - I feel energized just thinking about the members who will be happy to receive the gifts.
1000611531.korean: - 선물을 받고 기뻐할 대원들의 모습을 떠올리니 절로 힘이난다.

1000611532.english: - I manipulated the tablet to display the map as a hologram.

1000611533.english: - It's been a while since I discovered it, but it was pushed down in priority so I haven't been able to properly scout it.
1000611533.korean: - 발견한지는 조금 됐지만 우선순위에서 밀리는 바람에 그간 제대로 정찰하지 못했었다.

1000611535.english: Since it's close to us now, it might be a good idea to look for something useful there.
1000611535.korean: 마침 지금 우리랑 가까우니까 거기서 쓸만한 것들을 찾아보는 게 좋겠어.

1000611536.english: - I remember the reconnaissance report saying that the city seemed to have suffered little damage from the war of destruction.
1000611536.korean: - 그 도시는 멸망 전쟁의 피해를 거의 입지 않은 것 같다는 정찰 보고서의 내용이 기억난다.

1000611538.english: If you want to surprise your sisters, you have to avoid getting caught, right?
1000611538.korean: 언니들을 놀래켜주려면 일단 들키지 말아야하잖아, 그치?

1000611539.english: In that case, it's best to know as few people as possible.
1000611539.korean: 그러려면 아는 사람은 최대한 적은게 좋아.

1000611540.english: How about going out with someone who is good at moving stealthily?
1000611540.korean: 은밀하게 움직이는 걸 잘하는 사람이랑 같이 나가는게 어때?

1000611541.english: I think Feather Sister is suitable...

1000611543.english: - I lightly patted the doctor on the head as he sighed exaggeratedly.
1000611543.korean: - 과장스럽게 한숨을 내쉬는 닥터의 머리에 살짝 꿀밤을 먹였다.

1000611544.english: - Feather seems far from being secretive, both in his position in the Horde and his appearance...
1000611544.korean: - 페더는 호드에서 맡은 보직도 그렇고 겉모습도 그렇고 은밀함과는 거리가 먼 것 같은데...

1000611546.english: Okay, go and get ready, Big Brother. I'll contact Unnie Feather.
1000611546.korean: 자, 어서 가서 준비해 오빠. 페더 언니한테는 내가 연락할게.

1000611547.english: It's almost time for communication to arrive...

1000611550.english: See you again, Doctor. Is the Commander out of his office?
1000611550.korean: 또 보는군, 닥터. 사령관은 자리를 비웠나?

1000611551.english: Yeah, my brother is out for a bit.

1000611552.english: By the way, Sister, what happened to that crashed airship?
1000611552.korean: 그보다 언니, 그 추락한 비행선은 어떻게 됐어?

1000611553.english: I was just about to report on that.

1000611554.english: The swarm of Metal Parasites is tearing apart parts from the airship wreckage...

1000611555.english: No, I think it would be better to pass it on directly to the commander.
1000611555.korean: 아니, 사령관에게 직접 전달하는 편이 좋겠군.

1000611556.english: I'll wait at my current location for now. Please contact me when the commander returns. That's all.
1000611556.korean: 일단 현위치에서 대기하겠다. 사령관이 돌아오면 연락해주길 바란다. 이상.

1000611558.english: Sister, listen to me for a moment. To Big Brother... whisper...
1000611558.korean: 언니, 잠깐 내 얘기좀 들어봐. 오빠한테... 소곤소곤...

1000611559.english: ...I can't recommend deceiving the Commander, Doctor.

1000611560.english: Oh, no. That's not it. Listen a little more.
1000611560.korean: 아이 참. 그런게 아니야. 조금 더 들어봐.

1000611563.english: Right, right? Hehe, I thought Sister Khan would understand!
1000611563.korean: 그치그치? 히힛, 역시 칸 언니는 알아줄 것 같았어!

1000611564.english: My brother will be leaving soon, so let's get together with Sister Constance and the Commander Sisters and talk in the meantime.
1000611564.korean: 오빠는 곧 나갈 거니까, 그 사이에 콘스탄챠 언니랑 지휘관 언니들이랑 모여서 얘기해보자.

1000611565.english: Sister Marie is taking a little while... Sister Khan, please explain it to me, okay?
1000611565.korean: 마리 언니가 조금 걸리는데... 칸 언니가 잘 좀 말해줘, 응?

1000611566.english: Okay, I'll leave it to you.

1000611567.english: Then we will return to Orca and deal with the Metal Parasites along the commander's expected route.
1000611567.korean: 그럼 우리는 오르카로 복귀하며 사령관의 예상 동선에 있는 철충들을 처리하겠다.

1000611568.english: Huh? What about the airship? I need that...

1000611569.english: The commander's safety comes first. I'll definitely secure the parts later.
1000611569.korean: 사령관의 안전이 우선이다. 부품은 나중에 반드시 확보하겠다.

1000611571.english: Of course... I also play the role of watching over my brother without him noticing!
1000611571.korean: 물론... 오빠가 눈치채지 못하게 감시하는 역할도 겸해서!

1000611572.english: Yes, I heard from Feather. He entrusted me with something important.
1000611572.korean: 그래, 페더에게 들었다. 중요한 걸 맡겼더군.

1000611574.english: Oh, and I'm sorry. I was in a hurry, so I contacted Feather right away...
1000611574.korean: 아, 그리고 미안해. 급해서 바로 페더 언니한테 연락해버렸어...

1000611575.english: No problem. I'll also tell you to stay close to the commander.
1000611575.korean: 문제 없다. 사령관 옆에 잘 붙어있으라고 나도 따로 전해두지.

1000611576.english: Hehehe, thank you. I think I understand why the Horde sisters like Khan sister.
1000611576.korean: 히힛, 고마워. 호드 언니들이 왜 칸 언니를 좋아하는지 알 것 같아.

1000611577.english: Then I'll deal with the Metal Parasites and return. I'll go and talk about the airship. That's all.
1000611577.korean: 그럼 철충들을 처리하며 복귀하겠다. 비행선에 관해서는 가서 얘기하도록 하지. 이상.

1000611580.english: It's a lonely yet beautiful landscape.

1000611581.english: Now that I hear it, I get that feeling.

1000611582.english: This is a scene that really suits Valkyrie.

1000611583.english: Valkyrie, would you like to have a cup of tea with your sisters?
1000611583.korean: 저기 발키리님, 자매들과 차라도 한 잔 하시겠어요?

1000611585.english: Yes, that's fine. But please do it after this mission is over.
1000611585.korean: 네, 좋습니다. 다만 이번 임무가 끝나고 나서 부탁드립니다.

1000611586.english: I was thinking that I wasn't spending enough time with my sisters...
1000611586.korean: 자매들과 함께하는 시간이 부족하다고는 생각하고 있었습니다...

1000611587.english: Could you please invite me again later?
1000611587.korean: 나중에 다시 한 번 초대해 주시겠습니까?

1000611588.english: From the beginning, it was meant to be done together after completing the mission.
1000611588.korean: 처음부터 임무 완수 후에 함께하자는 뜻이었어요.

1000611589.english: Woohoo, I'm looking forward to it.

1000611590.english: Captain Leona, please report on the progress of the mission.
1000611590.korean: 레오나 대장이야. 임무 진행 상황 보고해줘.

1000611592.english: I didn't find anything special within the safe zone.
1000611592.korean: 안전지대 내에서는 별다른 것을 찾지 못했습니다.

1000611593.english: May I have your permission to expand the search area?
1000611593.korean: 수색 범위를 넓히는 것을 허가해 주시겠습니까?

1000611594.english: Okay, I'll leave it to Valkyrie's discretion.

1000611598.english: You've gained weight since I saw you last night.

1000611600.english: You know very well that my eyes are not deceived, right?
1000611600.korean: 내 눈이 틀리지 않는다는 건 너도 잘 알잖아?

1000611601.english: Anyway, good luck. Take care of your body too. You'll regret it in the summer, won't you?
1000611601.korean: 아무튼 고생해. 몸매관리도 좀 신경 쓰고. 그러다 여름에 후회한다?

1000611604.english: I wanted to search as wide a range as possible...
1000611604.korean: 가급적... 가급적 넓은 범위를 수색하고 싶어졌어요...

1000611605.english: Okay, I'll go first, so please follow my signal.
1000611605.korean: 알겠습니다. 선행할테니 제 신호를 따라와 주십시오.

1000611607.english: Ah, ahaha... As expected from Valkyrie... You are serious about carrying out your mission.
1000611607.korean: 아, 아하하... 역시 발키리님... 임무수행에는 진지하시네요.

1000611614.english: Sister Vera! I'll give you this! Just look at it once!

1000611616.english: But... ammo is heavy and you can't eat it...
1000611616.korean: 그치만... 탄약은 무거운데다가 먹을 수도 없잖아...

1000611618.english: Ugh... Sister Vera, are you going to get mad...?
1000611618.korean: 우으... 베라 언니, 화 낼 거야...?

1000611620.english: Haa... Come here. I knew this would happen, so I brought yours too.
1000611620.korean: 하아... 이리 와. 이럴 줄 알고 네 것 까지 챙겨 왔으니까.

1000611624.english: You'll do it again, won't you? If you do this again, I'll really feed you ammo, right?
1000611624.korean: 또 그럴 거야, 안 그럴 거야. 다음에도 이러면 진짜 탄약을 먹여버린다?

1000611626.english: Oh my, it's always amazing to see Alvis's balls grow.
1000611626.korean: 어머, 알비스의 볼이 늘어나는 건 언제봐도 신기하네요.

1000611628.english: Hohoho, our Alvis, if you keep going like this, your cheeks will fall off, right?
1000611628.korean: 우후후, 우리 알비스, 이러다가는 볼 살이 똑 떨어져버리겠네요?

1000611629.english: Oh, my...! I made a mistake...

1000611630.english: Ugh, really... Okay. Open the magazine.

1000611632.english: Oh my god! Are these all chocolate bars? I can't stand this...
1000611632.korean: 어머, 세상에! 이게 다 초코바야? 내가 못살아...

1000611633.english: Hehe. But is there anything special about Vera?
1000611633.korean: 후훗. 그런데 베라 쪽은 특이사항 없나요?

1000611634.english: Yes... Our squad isn't getting much done. They're asking us to find gifts in the snowy fields...
1000611634.korean: 네... 저희 분대는 별 소득 없어요. 설원에서 선물을 찾아오라니...

1000611635.english: First, I need to ask the captain to expand the search area.
1000611635.korean: 우선 대장님께 수색 범위를 늘려달라고 요청해야겠어요.

1000611636.english: Oh, we did that. Valkyrie is conducting a preliminary reconnaissance.
1000611636.korean: 아, 그건 저희쪽에서 했어요. 발키리님이 선행 정찰 중이에요.

1000611637.english: Huh? Sisters, I got a radio message from Valkyrie.

1000611638.english: They found Metal Parasites in the front.

1000611639.english: In this case, it was a matter of reporting first and then taking action later... I will report.
1000611639.korean: 이럴때는 선보고 후조치였죠... 보고는 제가 할게요.

1000611641.english: Sister Vera, come to my side!
1000611641.korean: 베라 언니, 어서 내 옆으로 와!

1000611643.english: Lady Leona has decided to send reinforcements from the main force.

1000611644.english: I'll be there soon, so take cover and wait.

1000611646.english: Phew, thanks for the little while ago, Alvis. Thanks to you, I'm safe.
1000611646.korean: 휴우, 방금 전엔 고마웠어 알비스. 덕분에 무사했네.

1000611647.english: Hehehe! Protecting my sisters is what I do best!
1000611647.korean: 헤헷! 언니들을 지키는건 내가 제일 잘하는 일이니까!

1000611648.english: Valkyrie engagement reported over. Is everyone safe?
1000611648.korean: 발키리 교전 종료 보고합니다. 모두 무사하신가요?

1000611649.english: Yeah yeah! I protected my sisters!

1000611650.english: Ah, Alvis... Long time no see.

1000611653.english: Yeah... You don't know how to float?

1000611654.english: ...I don't know much about that... but, um, I can at least stroke it...
1000611654.korean: ...그건 잘 모르지만... 으음, 쓰다듬는 건 정도는 해줄 수...

1000611655.english: Alvis, we are on a mission right now.

1000611656.english: What did you say I should do while on a mission last time?
1000611656.korean: 언니가 저번에 임무중엔 어떻게 해야된다고 했지?

1000611658.english: I told you it's dangerous to get tangled up with other sisters in a combat zone.
1000611658.korean: 교전 지역에서 다른 자매들한테 엉겨붙으면 위험하다고 했잖아.

1000611663.english: By the way, Valkyrie? Do you have something to say?

1000611665.english: I will relay the orders given to Captain Leona.

1000611666.english: He told me to search the nearby city I discovered last time.
1000611666.korean: 저번에 발견했던 근처 도시를 수색하라고 하셨습니다.

1000611667.english: I'll take the lead. Please check all communication channels.

1000611670.english: Okay, eat this if you get hungry.

1000611671.english: Alvis will put it in your bag... Oh, you didn't bring your rabbit bag today?
1000611671.korean: 알비스가 가방에 넣어줄게... 어, 오늘은 토끼 가방 안 가져왔어?

1000611672.english: ...I left my bag behind, but... thank you, Alvis.

1000611674.english: Okay, Vera, you worked hard too, so eat a chocolate bar.

1000611675.english: Um... My sister doesn't have much of an appetite, so I'll take it next time. Thanks.
1000611675.korean: 음... 언니는 별로 입맛이 없어서 다음에 받을게. 고마워.

1000611676.english: It's okay. You didn't gain much weight, sis. And if you share it with Alvis, you won't gain weight.
1000611676.korean: 괜찮아. 언니 살 별로 안쪘어. 그리고 알비스랑 나눠 먹으면 살 안쪄.

1000611677.english: Hey, hey, what are you talking about?! I haven't gained any weight?!
1000611677.korean: 얘, 얘는 무, 무슨소릴 하는거니?! 나 살 안쪘거든?!

1000611678.english: Huh...? My sister's stomach definitely hurt when I took a bath last time...
1000611678.korean: 우웅...? 분명 저번에 목욕할 때 언니 배가...

1000611680.english: Everyone's here? The battlefield has been cleared and the main force has returned.
1000611680.korean: 다들 여기 계셨군요? 전장 정리 끝나고 본대 분들은 복귀하셨어요.

1000611681.english: Yes... Alvis, you must never tell the Commander that, right?
1000611681.korean: 네... 알비스, 너 그거 사령관님한테는 절대로 얘기하면 안 된다?

1000611682.english: And the alert level just went up due to the engagement.

1000611683.english: He told me to join this squad, including Valkyrie, who went first.
1000611683.korean: 먼저 가신 발키리님을 포함해서 저까지 이 분대에 합류하라고 하시네요.

1000611684.english: Wow! So Nymph is coming with us too?
1000611684.korean: 우와! 그럼 님프 언니도 우리랑 같이 가는거야?

1000611685.english: Hehehe. Yes. Please take good care of this mission as well, Alvis.
1000611685.korean: 후훗. 그래요. 이번 임무도 잘 부탁해요, 알비스.

1000611686.english: Yeah! Let's hurry and follow Valkyrie!

1000611689.english: Oh, it's nothing special... It's rare for Alvis to not give his sisters a chocolate bar...
1000611689.korean: 아, 별 건 아닌데요... 알비스가 자매에게 초코바를 안 주는건 드문일이라...

1000611690.english: Oh, that's that! That's because I gave 3 to Nymph Unnie before we went out.
1000611690.korean: 아, 그건그건! 님프 언니한테는 출격하기 전에 3개나 줘서 그래.

1000611691.english: You shouldn't eat any more. You'll gain weight.
1000611691.korean: 더 먹으면 안 돼. 언니 살쪄.

1000611692.english: Ah, ahaha, Alvis... I shouldn't be talking about things like that...
1000611692.korean: 아, 아하하, 알비스... 그런 건 막 얘기하면 안 되는데...

1000611693.english: Three...? That one has a lot of calories...

1000611695.english: Uh, uh... Let's go quickly! We have to hurry if we're going to follow Valkyrie. It'll be good exercise, too.
1000611695.korean: 저, 저.... 얼른 출발하죠! 발키리님을 따라가려면 서둘러야하니까요. 운동도 될 거구요.

1000611697.english: That... chocolate bar... is... a long-awaited snow mission... to withstand the cold...
1000611697.korean: 그... 초코바는... 오랜만에 설원 작전이니까... 추위에 버티기 위해...

1000611698.english: ... ...No... Let's go... Running would be nice too...

1000611699.english: Are you ready, sisters? Then let's go!

1000611700.english: ...But Alvis, the chocolate bars Alvis gave you were two, not three...
1000611700.korean: ... 그런데 알비스, 알비스가 준 초코바는 3개가 아니라 2개였잖아요...

1000611701.english: Oh, really? Then should I give you one more?
1000611701.korean: 응, 그랬나? 그럼 하나 더 줄까?

1000611702.english: No... Thank you for your concern, Alvis...

1000611703.english: Lieutenant, let's double-check the items we need to get.
1000611703.korean: 중위, 구해야할 품목들을 다시 한 번 확인해 보도록.

1000611705.english: Haha, while Khan is picking up some trivial parts, we prepare a nice gift for the Commander.
1000611705.korean: 후후, 칸이 시시한 부품이나 줍고 있을때 우린 사령관에게 근사한 선물을 준비하는거야.

1000611706.english: Please make it exactly the size of the commander. If it's even slightly too small or too big, it'll be a problem.
1000611706.korean: 사령관의 사이즈에 딱 맞는걸로 부탁해. 조금이라도 작거나 크면 곤란하니까.

1000611708.english: Please report the progress regularly. Okay.

1000611709.english: Huh? What's going on, Sand Girl? Why is Captain Leona asking us...
1000611709.korean: 엥? 샌드걸님 무슨일이죠? 레오나 대장님이 어째서 저희에게...

1000611710.english: This is the order to sortie.

1000611711.english: Huh? A sudden sortie order? Where are we going? The Iron Claws have arrived?
1000611711.korean: 네? 갑자기 출격 명령이요? 어디로요? 철충 떴대요?

1000611712.english: Haha, I wish it had been like that.

1000611715.english: Phew... Well, I'll tell you soon enough.
1000611715.korean: 휴... 뭐, 얼마 안가서 다 알게 될테니 말씀 드리죠.

1000611716.english: You know Captain Leona is getting impatient these days, right?
1000611716.korean: 요즘 레오나 대장이 조급해하는 건 알고 계시죠?

1000611718.english: Since Captain Marie entered the Commander's bedroom... right...
1000611718.korean: 마리 대장님이 사령관님 침실에 들어가신 후부터... 그렇죠...

1000611719.english: Yeah, that's right. It was fine up until that point...

1000611720.english: Lately, Captain Khan's Horde has been making a lot of achievements, which has become a problem.
1000611720.korean: 요새 칸 대장님의 호드가 성과를 많이 올리는 바람에 문제가 됐어요.

1000611721.english: Oh, it had to be the Horde...

1000611722.english: Since our captain is a restoration machine, he must have been secretly aware of Captain Khan even on a regular basis, right?
1000611722.korean: 아무래도 저희 대장님은 복원기체다 보니 평소에도 칸 대장님을 은근히 의식하셨잖아요?

1000611724.english: However, Captain Khan doesn't seem to care much.
1000611724.korean: 정작 칸 대장님은 별로 신경 안쓰는 것 같지만요.

1000611725.english: I don't know how Captain Khan fights so well with those fools.
1000611725.korean: 칸 대장님은 그 바보들 데리고 어떻게 그렇게 잘 싸우시는지 모르겠다니까요?

1000611726.english: It deserves to be one of the seven mysteries of Orca.
1000611726.korean: 오르카 7대 미스테리 중 하나가 될 만 해요.

1000611727.english: Since you are that capable, Captain Leona must be aware of it too.
1000611727.korean: 그만큼 유능하시니까 레오나 대장님도 의식하시는 거겠죠.

1000611728.english: And this is... that's the mission objective that was given to us.
1000611728.korean: 그리고 이게... 그것때문에 저희에게 내려온 임무 목표예요.

1000611729.english: Uh... a wristwatch... a suit... shoes? Um, so...
1000611729.korean: 어... 손목시계... 정장에... 구두? 음 그러니까...

1000611730.english: Ah! Captain Leona wants to give you a gift? Wow!
1000611730.korean: 아! 레오나 대장님이 사령관님께 선물하시려는 거죠? 꺄아!

1000611731.english: Yes, it's a common gift for women to give men when they want to show off.
1000611731.korean: 그래요. 여성이 남성을 꾸며주고 싶을때 흔히 하는 선물이죠.

1000611732.english: Hehe, that's typical of Captain Leona.

1000611736.english: Still, it's pretty average up to here. Would you like to check out the items listed at the bottom of the list?
1000611736.korean: 그래도 여기까진 평범한 편이에요.&n리스트 하단에 적힌 품목들도 확인해 보시겠어요?

1000611738.english: ... wine, better wine, more expensive wine...?!
1000611738.korean: ... 와인이랑 더 좋은 와인이랑 더 값진 와인...?!

1000611739.english: Can you guess what I mean?

1000611740.english: Trying to get the Commander to drink... You're going to finish him off, aren't you?
1000611740.korean: 사령관님께 술을 먹이려고 하시다니... 끝장을 보시겠다는 거죠, 이건...

1000611743.english: Hehe, Lieutenant? Please include me in that mission. I'm sick of providing rear support.
1000611743.korean: 우히히, 중위님? 그 임무에 저도 끼워주세요. 후방 지원은 이제 지긋지긋하거든요.

1000611744.english: ...Let me suggest this to the captain.

1000611745.english: [c][57e137]A moment later, a squad of Valkyries in action[-][/c]

1000611746.english: Sister, but why are we looking for a gift?
1000611746.korean: 언니, 그런데 우리는 왜 선물을 찾고 있는거야?

1000611748.english: You don't have to know. It's the adults' business.

1000611750.english: It's okay if our Alvis doesn't know yet. Okay, shall we go over there for a bit with my sister?
1000611750.korean: 우리 알비스는 아직 몰라도 괜찮아요. 자, 언니랑 잠깐 저쪽에 갈까요?

1000611751.english: I can't be pushed by Steel Line...

1000611753.english: Are you waiting for Valkyrie too?

1000611756.english: When a man and a woman who have feelings for each other meet more than ten times... well, that can't be helped...
1000611756.korean: 호감을 가진 남녀가 열 번 이상 만나면... 그, 그런건 어쩔 수 없는...

1000611757.english: Oh, there's a call coming in.

1000611759.english: ...This is a message that Sand Girl is joining.

1000611760.english: It would be a good idea to secure the area in advance. I'll take the lead.
1000611760.korean: 미리 구역을 확보해두는 것이 좋겠군요. 선도하겠습니다.

1000611761.english: Wait a minute! Tell me more!

1000611762.english: Thanks to you, I landed safely. Thank you for your support.

1000611763.english: You're here. The other squad members are still searching the area.
1000611763.korean: 오셨군요. 다른 분대원들은 주변을 마저 수색중이에요.

1000611764.english: Hoho, air support and technical support for the infantry squad... It's been a while since our sisters have gathered together like this...
1000611764.korean: 후후, 보병 분대에 공중지원, 기술지원까지... 우리 자매들이 이렇게 한자리에 모이는 게 얼마만인지...

1000611766.english: Ahem, sorry to interrupt, but I have some instructions for the squad.
1000611766.korean: 흠흠, 끼어들어서 죄송하지만 분대에 하달할 내용이 있습니다.

1000611767.english: In addition to the mission this squad is currently performing, additional material search instructions have been issued.
1000611767.korean: 본 분대가 수행중인 임무에 더해, 추가적인 물자 탐색 지시가 내려왔습니다.

1000611768.english: So we, who were only in the rear, came to help!

1000611770.english: There are quite a few... Oh, these are... hmm...

1000611774.english: I don't know if I can get it or not...

1000611775.english: I have no choice but to do my best.

1000611776.english: Well, please pass this on to your sisters. I will support you from heaven.
1000611776.korean: 그럼, 자매들에게 전달 부탁 드립니다. 저는 하늘에서 지원하겠습니다.

1000611777.english: Oh, right! Nymph! Would you like to see this?
1000611777.korean: 아 맞아! 님프님! 이거 한 번 보시겠어요?

1000611779.english: Just a moment... I took this picture a little while ago when I came here.

1000611781.english: Oh my, you're the commander, right?

1000611782.english: Three close-quarters escorts... They came out quite far away. Is that okay?
1000611782.korean: 근접 호위가 셋... 꽤 멀리 나오셨는데 저정도로 괜찮을까요?

1000611783.english: Let's pause the mission and join us...
1000611783.korean: 임무를 잠시 중단하고 저희도 동행하는 게...

1000611784.english: Look closely. You don't have to worry about that, right?
1000611784.korean: 자세히 보세요. 그건 걱정 안해도 될 걸요?

1000611786.english: I'm sure there's nothing to worry about. And with Talon Feather...
1000611786.korean: 확실히 걱정은 없겠네요. 그리고 탈론페더 님이랑...

1000611787.english: Who is that...? Why is he naked in this snowy field...?
1000611787.korean: 저건 누구지...? 왜 이런 눈밭에서 알몸으로...?

1000611789.english: Oh, I can kind of imagine it.

1000611791.english: Portia... You're so happy you're about to cry. Well, I suppose so... If you receive such a reward...
1000611791.korean: 포티아님... 기뻐서 울려고 하시네요. 하긴 그렇겠죠... 그런 포상을 받으면...

1000611792.english: Nymph, how about wearing something like that?
1000611792.korean: 님프 님도 저런 옷 입어보시는 게 어때요?

1000611795.english: I need more time. I need to stop eating chocolate bars first...
1000611795.korean: 시간이 더 필요해요. 일단 초코바부터 끊어야...

1000611796.english: Excuse me. This is Captain Leona.

1000611797.english: You said it was a top priority.

1000611798.english: Did I miss something? Oh, no way...

1000611799.english: Khuhuhu... Right, that's a top priority... We're at war right now, so you have to be careful... Hehe...
1000611799.korean: 크후후... 그렇죠, 최우선 사항일 만 하네요... 지금은 전쟁 중이니까 조심하셔야죠... 흐흐...

1000611801.english: The Commander is preparing a surprise party for us.
1000611801.korean: 사령관님께서 저희를 위해 깜짝 파티를 준비중이시라고 합니다.

1000611802.korean: 지금 나와 계시는 것도 그것을 위한 것이구요.

1000611804.english: Wow- what should I do! Our commander is so cute!
1000611804.korean: 꺄아- 어떡해! 우리 사령관님 너무 귀여우셔!

1000611806.english: Huh? But if you tell us that, it won't be a surprise party, right?
1000611806.korean: 어? 그런데 그걸 저희한테 알려주시면 깜짝 파티가 아니지 않나요?

1000611807.english: This is where it gets important.

1000611808.english: After receiving that surprise party, we prepare a surprise party too.
1000611808.korean: 그 깜짝 파티를 받고, 저희도 깜짝 파티를 준비합니다.

1000611809.english: By now, it should have been spread from the captain to all the members.
1000611809.korean: 지금쯤 대장님들로부터 모든 대원들에게 전파되고 있겠죠.

1000611810.english: Haha, I can see whose idea this is.
1000611810.korean: 후후, 누구 머리에서 나온 아이디어인지 알겠네요.

1000611811.english: I'll pass this on to the other squad members too.

1000611812.english: But... what should we do now?
1000611812.korean: 그런데... 그러면 저희는 이제 뭘 하면 되죠?

1000611813.english: Just carry out the mission as it is.

1000611814.english: Among the items Captain Leona ordered... Ahem, with the exception of a very few items, our party can use them.
1000611814.korean: 레오나 대장님이 지시하신 물품 중... 크흠, 극히 일부 품목을 제외하곤 저희 파티에 쓰면 되니까요.

1000611815.english: The thing to be careful about is... security.

1000611816.english: I absolutely cannot let the Commander find out.

1000611817.english: And since Orca is out there wandering around...

1000611818.english: The people attached as escorts will guide us well, but we should also be careful.
1000611818.korean: 호위로 붙어있는 인원이 잘 유도하겠지만 저희도 조심하는 게 좋을 겁니다.

1000611819.english: Let's move before the Commander catches up to us.

1000611823.english: Hwaa... Circe... Am I still alive...?
1000611823.korean: 흐아... 키르케씨이... 저 아직 살아 있나요...?

1000611825.english: Oh my, Yumi... Why are there two of you?
1000611825.korean: 어머, 유미님... 왜 두 분이 되셨죠오?

1000611827.english: I wasn't asking to be carried on a broom...

1000611828.english: Hahaha, but you came quickly, right?

1000611829.english: And... thanks to that, I was able to think about the 'fuel' of the broom... hiccup.
1000611829.korean: 거기다... 덕분에 빗자루의 '연료'에 대해서도 떠올릴 수 있었고요... 딸꾹.

1000611830.english: It had a unique taste, but was it okay...?

1000611831.english: I've been feeling a little... sick... since a while ago...

1000611833.english: Oh, this is all gone now... hiccup.
1000611833.korean: 아, 이것도 이제 다 떨어졌네요... 딸꾹.

1000611834.english: I should have left the broom to drink, ugh...
1000611834.korean: 빗자루가 마실 건 남겨 뒀어야, 웁...

1000611835.english: ...You two have had a lot to drink.

1000611837.english: Aren't you Miss Valkyrie? Why are you here...?
1000611837.korean: 발키리 씨 아니세요? 왜 이런데 계시는거죠...?

1000611838.english: Sorry, I'm on an operation so...

1000611840.english: When I was working in the wilderness, I saw the Valhalla people doing operations!
1000611840.korean: 예전에 오지에서 근무할때 발할라 분들이 작전하시는 걸 봤거든요!

1000611843.english: Please wake up so I can take you to Orca.

1000611845.english: ...I will also bring Circe with me.

1000611846.english: No... I need to get some alcohol...

1000611848.english: Could you please tell me where you were trying to get it?
1000611848.korean: 어디서 구하시려고 했는지 알려주실 수 있습니까?

1000611852.english: Please take care of it. I will take care of it.

1000611854.english: Hmm, I'm finally sobering up now.

1000611856.english: Don't worry. Yumi is snoring and sleeping soundly, so I have nothing to do...
1000611856.korean: 별말씀을요. 유미님이 코 하고 잘 주무시길래 할 일이 없어서...

1000611858.english: I feel like I have a chemical chick in my stomach...
1000611858.korean: 뱃속에 캐미컬 칙이 들어가 있는 것 같아요...

1000611859.english: The harvester is thumping in my head...

1000611860.english: Ugh... How is Miss Circe okay?

1000611863.english: There is something I would like to ask Circe.
1000611863.korean: 키르케 님에게 여쭤보고 싶은 것이 있습니다.

1000611864.english: You said earlier that you were going to get some alcohol... Can you tell me where you were planning to go?
1000611864.korean: 아까 술을 구하러 가신다고 하셨는데... 어디로 갈 예정이셨는지 알 수 있을까요?

1000611865.english: I was going to the city right over there.
1000611865.korean: 바로 저쪽에 있는 도시로 가고 있었어요.

1000611866.english: I couldn't leave the theme park, but I sent my familiars out to scout the area.
1000611866.korean: 저는 테마파크에서 나갈 수 없었지만, 패밀리어들을 보내서 주변을 정찰했었거든요.

1000611867.english: Since the place was hardly damaged by the Metal Parasites, I received a lot of help here and there.
1000611867.korean: 그곳은 철충들에게 피해를 거의 받지 않아서 이것저것 도움을 많이 받았죠.

1000611869.english: Of course. As much as I love alcohol, I couldn't drink all that stuff. What a shame...
1000611869.korean: 그럼요. 제가 아무리 술을 좋아한다지만 그 많은 것들을 다 마시진 못했어요. &n아까워라...

1000611870.english: By the way, Valkyrie, do you like alcohol too? Then would you like to join our drinking club?
1000611870.korean: 그런데 발키리님도 술을 좋아하시나요? 그럼 저희 애주가 동아리에 들어오시겠어요?

1000611871.english: We formed it a little while ago, right, Yumi?

1000611873.english: I'm not going to drink it.

1000611874.english: ...I'm sorry. I can't say this is part of the mission...

1000611877.english: Could you please keep our drinking a secret?

1000611878.english: I'll also tell you where I got the alcohol.

1000611879.english: Oh, that's right. Please keep it a secret...!

1000611880.english: If Constance finds out, she'll be in big trouble...

1000611883.english: It would be best for Circe and Yumi to return. Just tell me their location.
1000611883.korean: 키르케님과 유미님은 돌아가시는 게 좋겠습니다. 위치만 알려주십시오.

1000611885.english: Wow... I only saw it in reconnaissance reports, but I didn't know it would be this good.
1000611885.korean: 우와아... 정찰 보고로만 봤는데, 이렇게 멀쩡할 줄은 몰랐네요.

1000611886.english: Yes, I think I can get most of what Captain Leona asked for, aside from alcohol.
1000611886.korean: 그렇습니다. 술 말고도 레오나 대장님이 부탁한 것들을 대부분 구할 수 있을 것 같습니다.

1000611887.english: I can throw you a grand party, Commander!
1000611887.korean: 사령관님께 성대한 파티를 열어드릴 수 있겠어요!

1000611888.english: Oh, but if you don't want to get caught, you can't sweep up too many supplies...
1000611888.korean: 아, 그래도 들키지 않으려면 물자를 너무 쓸어가도 안되겠네요...

1000611889.english: Oh, I got a call from Leona. I'll connect you.

1000611891.english: No, there's no need for that.

1000611892.english: A fool sent by Khan will arrive there shortly.
1000611892.korean: 잠시후에 그곳으로 칸이 보낸 바보 하나가 도착할거야.

1000611893.english: Shoot immediately upon sighting... No... &n ... Be careful of friendly fire.
1000611893.korean: 발견 즉시 쏴버... 아니... &n... 오인 사격에 주의해줘.

1000611894.english: Huh? Idiot...? Is this a joint operation?

1000611895.english: ...Haa. If only that had been the case, I wouldn't have been the one getting hurt.
1000611895.korean: ...하아. 차라리 그랬으면 나도 당하고만 있진 않았을텐데.

1000611896.english: I have to go ask Khan. Oh, and...
1000611896.korean: 난 칸에게 따지러 가야겠어. 아, 그리고...

1000611897.english: You'll have to prepare for battle. He's unnecessarily fast and noisy.
1000611897.korean: 전투준비를 해야 할거야. 쓸데없이 빠르고 시끄러운 녀석이니까.

1000611899.english: There are those who can guess.

1000611900.english: I think it would be best to prepare for battle as Captain Leona said.
1000611900.korean: 레오나 대장님 말씀대로 전투준비를 하는 것이 좋겠습니다.

1000611904.english: Mr. War Wolf? What on earth is going on here...

1000611905.english: We're on an operation. Could you tell us what you need?

1000611906.english: Haha... Ah... That's right. I don't think I can explain it right now.
1000611906.korean: 하하... 아... 그게 말이지. 지금 당장 설명해 주긴 힘들 것 같아.

1000611907.english: Because right now, the Metal Parasite guys are chasing me from behind.
1000611907.korean: 왜냐면, 지금 내 뒤로 철충 녀석들이 쫓아오고 있기 때문이지.

1000611908.english: Ironclad signal confirmed. Standby for engagement.

1000611910.english: Alright. Let's make a bet to see who catches more!
1000611910.korean: 좋았어. 누가 더 많이 잡나 내기해볼까!

1000611912.english: By the way... Are you sure you can't sell me that gun? I'm confident I'd be really good with a rifle.
1000611912.korean: 그나저나... 정말 그 총 나한테 팔 수 없는 거야? 나 소총 들면 정말 잘할 자신 있는데.

1000611914.english: Then let's do this. I'll give you all my guns.
1000611914.korean: 그럼 이렇게 하자. 내 권총 전부 줄게.

1000611915.english: I get one, Valkyrie, you get two.
1000611915.korean: 난 한 자루 받고, 발키리 너는 두 자루 받고.

1000611917.english: Mr. War Wolf, if you keep doing this, it's really going to be a problem.

1000611922.english: I found a huge shopping mall! And not just one, but several!
1000611922.korean: 커다란 쇼핑몰을 발견했어요! 그것도 한 채가 아니라 여럿이에요!

1000611923.english: Looks really clean! Approaching now... Whoa!
1000611923.korean: 굉장히 깨끗해 보여요! 지금 접근중... 우왓!

1000611926.english: Wow... the security AGS was still running.

1000611930.english: Then I will report to the captain as I move to the assembly point.

1000611932.english: I should have come the other way.
1000611932.korean: 올 때 반대쪽으로 올 걸 그랬어.

1000611933.english: Have you heard about that... party?

1000611934.english: I heard. Our Horde is chasing the Metal Parasites to get parts.
1000611934.korean: 들었지. 우리 호드는 부품을 얻는답시고 철충을 쫓아다니고 있을거야.

1000611935.english: What on earth are you going to use it for?

1000611936.english: From now on, it's a joint operation.

1000611937.english: Mr. War Wolf, please return to your unit and receive orders from Captain Khan...
1000611937.korean: 워울프님도 부대로 복귀하셔서 칸 대장님께 명령을 받으시는게...

1000611940.english: So... how about we go to a bar together later and have some fun?
1000611940.korean: 그런 이유로... 어때? 우리 나중에 같이 바에 가서 진탕 놀지 않을래?

1000611941.english: Since there's a ban on alcohol in Orca, I don't think I can join you. I'm sorry.
1000611941.korean: 오르카에 금주령이 내려진 이상, 어울려 드릴 수 없을 것 같습니다.&n죄송합니다.

1000611942.english: Yeah, well... I already knew Valkyrie wasn't interested in that kind of thing.
1000611942.korean: 그래, 뭐... 발키리가 그런 거에 관심 없다는 건 이미 알고있었지.

1000611943.english: Then should I go first? The battle earlier was fun.
1000611943.korean: 그럼 나 먼저 간다? 아까 전에 전투, 재미있었어.

1000611946.english: Although I can't sell you my rifle, War Wolf... &n I can lend it to you for a little while, if you want to practice shooting.
1000611946.korean: 비록 워울프님께 제 라이플을 팔 수는 없지만...&n사격 연습을 하는 정도라면, 잠깐 빌려드릴 순 있습니다.

1000611948.english: Valkyrie! Stay here and don't move! I'll come back with a target!
1000611948.korean: 발키리 너! 여기서 꼼짝 말고 기다려! 나 과녁 놓고 올테니까!

1000611949.english: There's no need to say anything. You know that promises made to me can't be cancelled, right?
1000611949.korean: 두말하기 없기다? 나랑 한 약속은 취소 안되는거 알지?

1000611951.english: And after the shooting is over, how about we return to Orca together?
1000611951.korean: 그리고 사격이 끝나면, 같이 오르카로 복귀하시는게 어떻겠습니까?

1000611953.english: Huh! Of course! &n I have to leave the target behind, so don't keep telling me.
1000611953.korean: 흥! 그야 당연하지! &n나 과녁 두고 와야 되니까, 자꾸 말시키지 말라고.

1000611955.english: Have you arrived at the assembly point?

1000611957.english: I'll be back with my friends.

1000611958.english: - I can barely move my heavy legs.

1000611959.english: - The weather is cold, but my whole body has been covered in sweat for a long time.
1000611959.korean: - 날씨는 춥지만, 온 몸은 땀투성이가 된 지 오래다.

1000611960.english: - I paused for a moment, stretched my back, and started walking again.
1000611960.korean: - 잠깐 멈춰서 허리를 풀고 다시 발걸음을 옮겼다.

1000611961.english: - Now that we've gathered most of the supplies we need, let's go back and take care of the pending work...
1000611961.korean: - 이걸로 필요한 물자는 거의 다 모였으니까, 돌아가면 일단 밀린 업무를...

1000611963.english: - Feather, who was walking next to me, caught me when I almost lost my balance because of the heavy load on my backpack.
1000611963.korean: - 배낭에 높이 쌓인 짐때문에 균형을 잃을 뻔한 나를 옆에서 걷던 페더가 붙잡아주었다.

1000611964.english: - There are a lot of things in the backpack that can be damaged.

1000611965.english: - If it had poured down, I would have had to go back to the city and stay up all night to do my work.
1000611965.korean: - 쏟아져버렸다면 다시 도시까지 돌아가야 했을거고, 업무를 보려면 또 밤을 새야 했겠지.

1000611966.english: - He smiled at Feather, who was looking at him with concern.

1000611967.english: - I put down the backpack, which I don't know how many I have already loaded, and returned to the captain's cabin.
1000611967.korean: - 벌써 몇 개째일지 모를 배낭을 내려놓고 함장실로 돌아왔다.

1000611968.english: - I was about to head straight to the bridge, but a sofa in the corner caught my eye.
1000611968.korean: - 바로 함교로 향하려고 했지만, 구석에 있는 소파가 눈길을 사로잡는다.

1000611970.english: - I sink into the soft sofa and a sigh escapes me without me realizing it.
1000611970.korean: - 푹신한 소파에 몸을 묻자 나도 모르게 한숨이 흘러나온다.

1000611971.english: - While I was taking a break to rest, trying not to fall asleep, the door to the captain's cabin rang.
1000611971.korean: - 그대로 잠들어버리지 않도록 신경쓰며 잠시 피로를 풀고 있을 때 함장실 문이 똑똑 울렸다.

1000611973.english: ...It seems like you're not doing very well.

1000611975.english: - I held back a yawn and checked the panel Armand had handed me.
1000611975.korean: - 하품을 참으며 아르망이 건네준 패널을 확인했다.

1000611976.english: Surprise parties are good, but Your Majesty's health is more important.
1000611976.korean: 깜짝파티도 좋지만 폐하의 건강이 더 중요합니다.

1000611977.english: If the crew found out that His Majesty was harming his health while preparing a surprise party, they wouldn't be very happy.
1000611977.korean: 폐하께서 깜짝파티를 준비하다 건강을 해쳤다는 걸 알면, 대원들도 별로 좋아하지 않을거예요.

1000611978.english: - Of course, compared to the total number of Orca members, the percentage of people I know now is not that much, but I am worried.
1000611978.korean: - 물론 전체 오르카 대원의 수에 비해선&n지금 알고 있는 사람의 비율은 얼마 되지 않겠지만 걱정이 앞선다.

1000611979.english: - If this keeps up, it's not going to be a surprise party anymore...
1000611979.korean: - 이러다가 깜짝파티가 아니게 되어버리는 거 아닌가...

1000611980.english: The doctor seemed to think it would be difficult to proceed with the work while hiding it from even me, his staff member.
1000611980.korean: 닥터는 참모인 저에게까지 숨기며 일을 진행하기는 어렵다고 생각한 모양입니다.

1000611981.english: Or, Your Majesty, are you confident that you can deceive me?
1000611981.korean: 아니면, 폐하께선 저를 속이실 자신이 있으신가요?

1000611982.english: Yes. As I said last time, from now on, my predictions about Your Majesty will never be wrong.
1000611982.korean: 그렇습니다. &n저번에도 말씀드렸다시피, 이제부터 폐하에 대한 제 예측이 빗나갈 일은 없습니다.

1000611984.english: - Seeing Armand make that assertion made me want to tease him a little.
1000611984.korean: - 아르망이 단언하는 걸 보니 조금 놀려보고 싶어졌다.

1000611985.english: Your Majesty, I'm not a mind reader, I just make predictions based on data...
1000611985.korean: 폐하, 저는 데이터를 기반으로 한 예측을 하지 독심술사가 아닙니다만...

1000611986.english: But... I think I can figure it out.
1000611986.korean: 그렇지만... 알 수 있을 것 같습니다.
