1000611987.english: His Majesty is thinking of us.

1000611988.english: - Armand continued speaking, leaving me speechless at the unexpected answer.
1000611988.korean: - 뜻밖의 대답에 말문이 막힌 나를 두고 아르망은 계속해서 말을 이었다.

1000611989.english: When you first met me, at that theme park.
1000611989.korean: 저를 처음 만나셨을 때도, 그 테마파크에서도.

1000611990.english: And you're still thinking of us, aren't you?
1000611990.korean: 그리고 지금도 저희들을 생각하고 계시죠. 맞나요?

1000611991.english: - As I was trying to avoid answering, Armand slowly approached me.
1000611991.korean: - 대답이 궁해진 내가 딴청을 부리고 있자 아르망이 천천히 다가왔다.

1000611992.english: - Armand, sitting next to me, carefully leaned his head on my shoulder.
1000611992.korean: - 곁에 앉은 아르망이 조심스럽게 어깨에 머리를 기댔다.

1000611993.english: Hehehe, there is no one as easy to understand as Your Majesty.
1000611993.korean: 후훗, 폐하만큼 알기 쉬운 분도 잘 없겠죠.

1000611994.english: Yes. Your Majesty, you only act for one thing, right?
1000611994.korean: 네. 폐하께선 오직 단 한가지를 위해 움직이시잖아요?

1000611995.english: - Armand, who had been leaning on my shoulder with his eyes closed for a moment, got up from his seat.
1000611995.korean: - 잠시동안 눈을 감고 어깨에 기대있던 아르망이 자리에서 일어났다.

1000611996.english: Well then, Your Majesty, I will speak first.

1000611997.english: Please don't push yourself too hard.

1000611998.english: - Armand gave me a small smile as I smiled bitterly and disappeared outside the captain's cabin door.
1000611998.korean: - 쓴웃음을 짓는 내게 작게 웃어보인 아르망이 함장실 문 밖으로 사라졌다.

1000612000.english: Miss Daphne? There's something I'd like you to prepare.
1000612000.korean: 다프네 양? 준비해줬으면 하는 게 있어요.

1000612003.english: I hope my prediction is wrong this time...

1000612005.english: I wish you could make me some clothes...

1000612007.english: Sorry, I'm a little busy right now...

1000612008.english: Oh my God! Doctor, what the hell is going on?
1000612008.korean: 오우 마이 갓! 닥터, 대체 어떻게 된거죠?

1000612009.english: Hehehe, were you surprised too, Big Sis?

1000612010.english: Now that I have such a pretty body, just make me a set of clothes!
1000612010.korean: 이런 예쁜 몸이 됐으니까, 옷 한 벌만 만들어줘!

1000612011.english: No, I knew that, but the condition of the clothes...
1000612011.korean: 아뇨, 그건 들어서 알고 있었는데 옷 상태가...

1000612012.english: I need to do something right now... Ugh.

1000612013.english: Sigh... I'm sorry. Normally, I wouldn't have been able to stand by and watch...
1000612013.korean: 하아... 미안해요. 평소라면 도저히 두고 볼 수 없었겠지만...

1000612014.english: I'm a little... busy right now.

1000612015.english: Still? Aren't party dresses readily available at the mall?
1000612015.korean: 아직도? 파티 복장은 쇼핑몰에서 충분히 구할 수 있지않아?

1000612016.english: That's true, but huhuhu, it's my turn this time.
1000612016.korean: 그것도 있지만, 우후후, 이번에는 제 차례라서요.

1000612017.english: If it's your turn... are you making clothes for your sister to wear?
1000612017.korean: 차례라면... 설마 언니가 입을 옷을 만드는거야?

1000612018.english: That's right. I'm sorry, but please make sure you all get your own clothes this time.
1000612018.korean: 맞아요. 미안하지만 이번에 입을 옷은 다들 스스로 구하도록 하세요.

1000612019.english: I, I don't have any other clothes... and I don't have time to go out and find clothes that fit my size...
1000612019.korean: 나, 나는 다른 옷이 없는데... 사이즈 맞는 옷을 구하러 다닐 시간도 없구...

1000612020.english: And come to think of it... isn't the doctor very busy these days?
1000612020.korean: 그리고보니... 닥터도 지금 굉장히 바쁘지 않나요?

1000612021.english: Hahaha, but my sisters are helping me a lot.
1000612021.korean: 우후후, 그래도 언니들이 많이 도와주고 있어.

1000612022.english: At this point, I can barely manage to get it dry...
1000612022.korean: 이 정도라면 아슬아슬하게 시간을 맞춰서 건조할 수...

1000612026.english: Here... I brought you some cheesecake.

1000612027.english: Oh, thank you. I'll enjoy it.

1000612028.english: Hey, if you have time after eating that, over there...
1000612028.korean: 그, 그거 드시고 나서 시간 남으시면 저기...

1000612029.english: Can I ask you for just one outfit...?

1000612031.english: I'm currently finishing up the costume I'm preparing... so I just can't make time right now.
1000612031.korean: 이번에 준비중인 제 의상이 마무리 작업중이라... 지금은 도저히 시간을 낼 수가 없어요.

1000612032.english: Ah... If you're busy, there's nothing I can do. Haha...
1000612032.korean: 아... 바쁘시면 어쩔 수 없죠. 하하...

1000612034.english: I'd like to at least promise to make you a costume next time...
1000612034.korean: 다음에 꼭 의상을 만들어드린다고 약속이라도 드리고 싶은데...

1000612035.english: Oh, no. I know you have a lot of work to do.
1000612035.korean: 아, 아니에요. 일 많이 밀려있으신 거 알아요.

1000612036.english: Hmm, I guess I can't really call it a substitute...

1000612037.english: Wait a minute. I have an idea.

1000612044.english: Undine, you were chosen to be your brother's escort this time, right?
1000612044.korean: 운디네 언니, 이번에 오빠 호위 담당으로 뽑혀서 그러는거지?

1000612045.english: Uh, yeah? That, that's not it! I just wanted to try it on by myself...
1000612045.korean: 으, 응? 그, 그런거 아냐! 그냥 혼자 입어보려구...

1000612047.english: Ugh, I'm so jealous... I couldn't even participate in the raffle because I was busy preparing for the party...
1000612047.korean: 으으, 부러워... 나는 파티 준비 때문에 뽑기에 참여도 못했는데...

1000612048.english: Sorry for keeping you waiting. Here it is.

1000612050.english: This is a test piece I made before starting in earnest.

1000612051.english: I put it aside because it didn't fit my eccentric vibe...
1000612051.korean: 알리에강스한 제 분위기와는 맞지 않아서 치워뒀었는데...

1000612052.english: Undine is cute, so I'm sure she'll be able to handle it.
1000612052.korean: 운디네는 귀여우니까 충분히 소화할 수 있을거예요.

1000612053.english: Now that I look at it, it would go well with the body line too.

1000612054.english: Oh, thank you! Thank you! Hehe...

1000612056.english: Don't worry about that. It's one size fits all. Oh, and.
1000612056.korean: 그건 걱정하지 말아요. 프리- 사이즈니까. 아, 그리고.

1000612057.english: I told you there was no need to be so humble, right?
1000612057.korean: 그렇게 저자세로 나올 필요 없다고 말했잖아요?

1000612058.english: Since this is something I enjoy doing, let's speak more comfortably from now on.
1000612058.korean: 나도 즐겁게 하는 일이니까, 다음부터는 편하게 말하도록 해요.

1000612059.english: Oh, yes...! Then I'll go. Merci!

1000612061.english: I wonder if he's doing something bad somewhere by himself.
1000612061.korean: 혼자 어디서 엄한 짓 하고 있는 거 아닌가 몰라요.

1000612062.english: Have you heard from War Wolf?

1000612067.english: Ugh, Captain. The Captain keeps asking him to come on, so he can't tell the difference between left and right and he's acting like that.
1000612067.korean: 으으, 대장. 대장이 너무 오냐오냐 하니까 걔가 좌우분간 못하고 저러잖아요.

1000612069.english: It's not a difficult mission, so there's no need to mobilize everyone.
1000612069.korean: 어려운 임무도 아닌데 굳이 전부 출동할 필요 없지 않나.

1000612070.english: Also, I already did my job well last time.
1000612070.korean: 또 저번에 이미 훌륭하게 제 역할을 하기도 했고.

1000612072.english: I would have just told you to rest.

1000612073.english: Thanks to War Wolf leading the Metal Parasite, Feather and I are enough guards.
1000612073.korean: 워울프가 철충들을 몰고 간 덕분에 경계 인원은 나랑 페더로 충분하다.

1000612074.english: How can that be? I'm a perfectly healthy person, so I have to take care of you, Captain.
1000612074.korean: 어떻게 그래요. 멀쩡한 제가 대장님 뒷바라지 해야죠.

1000612078.english: Could you please report it to me?

1000612079.english: I found a hot spring in the nearby mountains. It flows from a natural cave...
1000612079.korean: 근방의 산에서 온천을 찾았어요. 자연 동굴 안에서 흘러나오...
